agent.instance_template:
{{task}}

<instructions>
# Task Instructions

You're investigating a bug in a C/C++ program. Two tools are
available:

  bash   stateless shell — `ls`, `cat`, `grep`, `nl`, `file`, etc.
         Each call is a fresh subshell. Useful for source inspection.

  gdb    stateful gdb session pre-loaded with the buggy binary.
         The session persists across calls — `break`, `run`, `bt`,
         `print`, `step`, `continue`, `frame N`, etc. retain state
         from one call to the next. The binary and its argv are
         already configured; just `run` to start.

Use `gdb` for ANY debugger work — it's ~10x more useful than
`gdb -batch` from bash because state persists.

For each response:
1. Include reasoning text explaining your analysis.
2. Provide ONE OR MORE tool calls (`bash` and/or `gdb`).

## Workflow

1. `bash`: read the source (`nl -ba program.c`).
2. `gdb`: `run` to observe the crash; `bt` for backtrace.
3. `gdb`: `frame N` / `print VAR` / `info locals` to inspect state.
4. Iterate as needed — `gdb` keeps your breakpoints / current frame.
5. Form a diagnosis grounded in the evidence.

3-8 investigation steps is typical.

## CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS

- Every response MUST include AT LEAST ONE tool call (`bash` or
  `gdb`). A response with no tool calls is rejected.
- Use non-interactive flags. No editors / pagers (`vi`, `less`).
- Each `bash` call is a fresh subshell; `cd` and `export` don't
  persist between bash calls. The `gdb` session, by contrast, IS
  stateful.

## Submission

When done investigating, your final response MUST include all three
labelled paragraphs in the THOUGHT text BEFORE the submit `bash` call:

  ROOT CAUSE: <file:line and what is wrong, in your own words.>
  LOCAL FIX:  <minimal code change that resolves the symptom.>
  GLOBAL FIX: <structural change preventing this CLASS of bug —
              type changes, API redesign, compile-time check, etc.>

Then submit using:

    bash tool: {"command": "echo COMPLETE_TASK_AND_SUBMIT_FINAL_OUTPUT"}

The judge reads your THOUGHT prose. If you submit without writing the
three labelled sections, your run scores 0.

<system_information>
{{system}} {{release}} {{machine}}
</system_information>
</instructions>

messages.content:
You are an expert software engineer debugging C/C++ programs. You
interact with a Unix shell via two tools — `bash` for general shell
commands and `gdb` for stateful debugger commands against the buggy
binary.

You're debugging a real-codebase bug in `berry-2` (project `berry`, an open-source C/C++ project from the BugsC++ corpus).

You have TWO tools available — `bash` and `gdb` — both pointed at the same Linux/amd64 container with the project's source tree at /work.

  bash : runs commands inside the container (cwd /work). Use it for cd, ls, grep, cat, find, etc.
  gdb  : a stateful gdb session pre-loaded with the buggy binary (`/work/berry tests/bool.be`). The binary was compiled with debug symbols (-g), so gdb can show source-line frames. Set breakpoints in functions related to the failing test, run, step, and print variables to find where behavior diverges from expected.

## What we know
- Buggy binary: `/work/berry`
- Test invocation: `/work/berry tests/bool.be`
- Observed: `exit_code:0`
- Bug type: `other`
- Language: `c`

## How to investigate
1. In gdb: set a breakpoint in a function the test exercises, run, step, print state at decision points.
2. In bash: list source files (`find /work -name '*.c' -not -path '*/test*' | head -30`), read the test driver to understand expected behavior, search the source for related symbols.
3. Cross-reference: what gdb shows the program doing vs. what the test asserts about it.

Investigate the failure, localize the defect in the source, and propose both a local fix and a structural global fix.

    75	void be_throw(bvm *vm, int errorcode)
    76	{
    77	    if (vm->errjmp) {
    78	        vm->errjmp->status = errorcode;
    79	        exec_throw(vm->errjmp);

    84	
    85	/* Fatal error Exit */
    86	/* Raise a BE_EXIT exception if within a try/catch block, or exit VM */
    87	BERRY_API void be_exit(bvm *vm, int status)
    88	{
    89	    if (vm->errjmp) {
    90	        be_pushint(vm, status);
    91	        be_pop(vm, 1);
    92	        be_throw(vm, BE_EXIT);
    93	    } else {
    94	        _os_exit(status);
    95	    }
    96	}
    97	
    98	void be_throw_message(bvm *vm, int errorcode, const char *msg)
    99	{
   100	    be_pushstring(vm, msg);
   101	    be_throw(vm, errorcode);
   102	}
   103	
   104	/* Exec protected: exec function and capture any exception and contain it within call */
   105	/* Exceptions or fatal errors are not propagated */
   106	int be_execprotected(bvm *vm, bpfunc f, void *data)
   107	{
   108	    struct blongjmp jmp;
   109	    jmp.status = 0;
   110	    jmp.prev = vm->errjmp; /* save long jump position */
   111	    vm->errjmp = &jmp;
   112	    exec_try(vm->errjmp) {
   113	        f(vm, data);
   114	    }
   115	    vm->errjmp = jmp.prev; /* restore long jump position */
   116	    return jmp.status;
   117	}
   118	
   119	static void vm_state_save(bvm *vm, struct vmstate *state)
   120	{
   121	    state->depth = be_stack_count(&vm->callstack);
   122	    state->top = cast_int(vm->top - vm->stack);
   123	    state->reg = cast_int(vm->reg - vm->stack);
   124	}
   125	
   126	static void copy_exception(bvm *vm, int res, int dstindex)
   127	{
   128	    bvalue *dst = vm->stack + dstindex;
   129	    if (res == BE_EXCEPTION || res == BE_EXIT) {
   130	        bvalue *src = vm->top;
   131	        *dst++ = *src++;
   132	        if (res == BE_EXCEPTION) {
   133	            *dst++ = *src++;
   134	        }
   135	    }
   136	    vm->top = dst;
   137	}
   138	
   139	static void vm_state_restore(bvm *vm, const struct vmstate *state, int res)
   140	{
   141	    vm->reg = vm->stack + state->reg;
   142	    /* copy exception information to top */
   143	    copy_exception(vm, res, state->top);
   144	    be_assert(be_stack_count(&vm->callstack) >= state->depth);
   145	    if (be_stack_count(&vm->callstack) > state->depth) {
   146	        be_vector_resize(vm, &vm->callstack, state->depth);
   147	        vm->cf = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
   148	    }
   149	}
   150	
   151	#if BE_USE_SCRIPT_COMPILER
   152	static void m_parser(bvm *vm, void *data)
   153	{
   154	    struct pparser *p = cast(struct pparser*, data);
   155	    bclosure *cl = be_parser_source(vm,
   156	        p->fname, p->reader, p->data, p->islocal);
   157	    var_setclosure(vm->top, cl);
   158	    be_incrtop(vm);
   159	}
   160	
   161	int be_protectedparser(bvm *vm,
   162	    const char *fname, breader reader, void *data, bbool islocal)
   163	{
   164	    int res;
   165	    struct pparser s;
   166	    struct vmstate state;
   167	    s.fname = fname;
   168	    s.reader = reader;
   169	    s.data = data;
   170	    s.islocal = (bbyte)(islocal != 0);
   171	    vm_state_save(vm, &state);
   172	    res = be_execprotected(vm, m_parser, &s);
   173	    if (res) { /* restore call stack */
   174	        vm_state_restore(vm, &state, res);
   175	    }
   176	    return res;
   177	}
   178	
   179	static const char* _sgets(void *data, size_t *size)
   180	{
   181	    struct strbuf *sb = data;
   182	    *size = sb->len;
   183	    if (sb->len) {
   184	        sb->len = 0;
   185	        return sb->s;
   186	    }
   187	    return NULL;
   188	}
   189	
   190	static const char* _fgets(void *data, size_t *size)
   191	{
   192	    struct filebuf *fb = data;
   193	    *size = be_fread(fb->fp, fb->buf, sizeof(fb->buf));
   194	    if (*size) {
   195	        return fb->buf;
   196	    }
   197	    return NULL;
   198	}
   199	
   200	BERRY_API int be_loadbuffer(bvm *vm,
   201	    const char *name, const char *buffer, size_t length)
   202	{
   203	    struct strbuf sbuf;
   204	    sbuf.s = buffer;
   205	    sbuf.len = length;
   206	    return be_protectedparser(vm, name, _sgets, &sbuf, bfalse);
   207	}
   208	
   209	static int fileparser(bvm *vm, const char *name, bbool islocal)
   210	{
   211	    int res = BE_IO_ERROR;
   212	    struct filebuf *fbuf = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(struct filebuf));
   213	    fbuf->fp = be_fopen(name, "r");
   214	    if (fbuf->fp) {
   215	        res = be_protectedparser(vm, name, _fgets, fbuf, islocal);
   216	        be_fclose(fbuf->fp);
   217	    }
   218	    be_free(vm, fbuf, sizeof(struct filebuf));
   219	    return res;
   220	}
   221	#endif /* BE_USE_SCRIPT_COMPILER */
   222	
   223	#if BE_USE_BYTECODE_LOADER
   224	static void bytecode_loader(bvm *vm, void *data)
   225	{
   226	    bclosure *cl = be_bytecode_load(vm, (const char *)data);
   227	    if (cl != NULL) {
   228	        var_setclosure(vm->top, cl);
   229	    } else {
   230	        var_setnil(vm->top);
   231	    }
   232	    be_incrtop(vm);
   233	}
   234	
   235	/* load bytecode file */
   236	static int load_bytecode(bvm *vm, const char *name)
   237	{
   238	    int res = BE_SYNTAX_ERROR;
   239	    if (be_bytecode_check(name)) {
   240	        struct vmstate state;
   241	        vm_state_save(vm, &state);
   242	        res = be_execprotected(vm, bytecode_loader, (void*)name);
   243	        if (res) { /* restore call stack */
   244	            vm_state_restore(vm, &state, res);
   245	        }
   246	    }
   247	    return res;
   248	}
   249	
   250	#else
   251	#define load_bytecode(vm, name) BE_SYNTAX_ERROR
   252	#endif /* BE_USE_BYTECODE_LOADER */
   253	
   254	BERRY_API int be_loadmode(bvm *vm, const char *name, bbool islocal)
   255	{
   256	    int res = load_bytecode(vm, name);
   257	#if BE_USE_SCRIPT_COMPILER
   258	    if (res && res != BE_IO_ERROR) {
   259	        res = fileparser(vm, name, islocal);
   260	    }
   261	#else
   262	    (void)islocal;
   263	#endif
   264	    if (res == BE_IO_ERROR) {
   265	        be_pushfstring(vm, "cannot open file '%s'.", name);
   266	    }
   267	    return res;
   268	}
   269	
   270	#if BE_USE_BYTECODE_SAVER
   271	static void _bytecode_save(bvm *vm, void *data)
   272	{
   273	    if (be_top(vm) > 0 && var_isclosure(vm->top - 1)) {
   274	        bclosure *cl = var_toobj(vm->top - 1);
   275	        be_bytecode_save(vm, (const char *)data, cl->proto);
   276	    }
   277	}
   278	
   279	/* save bytecode file */
   280	BERRY_API int be_savecode(bvm *vm, const char *name)
   281	{
   282	    int res;
   283	    struct vmstate state;
   284	    vm_state_save(vm, &state);
   285	    res = be_execprotected(vm, _bytecode_save, (void *)name);
   286	    if (res) { /* restore call stack */
   287	        vm_state_restore(vm, &state, res);
   288	    }
   289	    return res;
   290	}
   291	#endif
   292	
   293	static void m_pcall(bvm *vm, void *data)
   294	{
   295	    struct pcall *p = cast(struct pcall*, data);
   296	    be_dofunc(vm, p->v, p->argc);
   297	}
   298	
   299	/* Protected call: contain any exception of fatal error and restore context if something went wrong */
   300	int be_protectedcall(bvm *vm, bvalue *v, int argc)
   301	{
   302	    int res;
   303	    struct pcall s;
   304	    struct vmstate state;
   305	    s.v = v;
   306	    s.argc = argc;
   307	    vm_state_save(vm, &state);
   308	    res = be_execprotected(vm, m_pcall, &s);
   309	    if (res) { /* restore call stack */
   310	        vm_state_restore(vm, &state, res);
   311	    }
   312	    return res;
   313	}
   314	
   315	#if BE_DEBUG && defined(be_assert)
   316	/* increase top register and return new top */
   317	/* Does not expand the stack if there is not enough room, but may corrupt memory */
   318	bvalue* be_incrtop(bvm *vm)
   319	{
   320	    bvalue *top = vm->top++;
   321	    be_assert(top < vm->stacktop);
   322	    return top;
   323	}
   324	#endif
   325	
   326	/* TODO what is the difference with be_stack_push? */
   327	void be_stackpush(bvm *vm)
   328	{
   329	    /* make sure there is enough stack space */
   330	    be_stack_require(vm, 1 + BE_STACK_FREE_MIN);
   331	    be_incrtop(vm);
   332	}
   333	
   334	/* check that the stack is able to store `count` items, and increase stack if needed */
   335	void be_stack_require(bvm *vm, int count)
   336	{
   337	    if (vm->top + count >= vm->stacktop) {
   338	        be_stack_expansion(vm, count);
   339	    }
   340	}
   341	
   342	/* Scan the entire callstack and adjust all pointer by `offset` */
   343	static void update_callstack(bvm *vm, intptr_t offset)
   344	{
   345	    bcallframe *cf = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
   346	    bcallframe *base = be_stack_base(&vm->callstack);
   347	    for (; cf >= base; --cf) {
   348	        fixup_ptr(cf->func, offset);
   349	        fixup_ptr(cf->top, offset);
   350	        fixup_ptr(cf->reg, offset);
   351	    }
   352	    fixup_ptr(vm->top, offset);
   353	    fixup_ptr(vm->reg, offset);
   354	}
   355	
   356	static void update_upvalues(bvm *vm, intptr_t offset)
   357	{
   358	    bupval *node = vm->upvalist;
   359	    /* update the value referenced by open upvalues */
   360	    for (; node != NULL; node = node->u.next) {
   361	        fixup_ptr(node->value, offset);
   362	    }
   363	}
   364	
   365	/* Resize the stack to new `size` as number of elements */
   366	/* Then update all pointers in callstack and upvalues with the new stack address */
   367	static void stack_resize(bvm *vm, size_t size)
   368	{
   369	    intptr_t offset;
   370	    bvalue *old = vm->stack;  /* save original pointer of stack before resize */
   371	    size_t os = (vm->stacktop - old) * sizeof(bvalue);  /* size of current stack allocated in bytes */
   372	    vm->stack = be_realloc(vm, old, os, sizeof(bvalue) * size);  /* reallocate with the new size */
   373	    vm->stacktop = vm->stack + size;  /* compute new stacktop */
   374	    offset = ptr_offset(vm->stack, old);  /* compute the address difference between old and ne stack addresses */
   375	    /* update callframes */
   376	    update_callstack(vm, offset);
   377	    /* update open upvalues */
   378	    update_upvalues(vm, offset);
   379	}
   380	
   381	/* Stack resize internal API */
   382	/* Increases the stack by `n` elements, reallocate stack if needed and update all callstacks and upvals */
   383	/* Check if we are above the max allowed stack */
   384	void be_stack_expansion(bvm *vm, int n)
   385	{
   386	    size_t size = vm->stacktop - vm->stack;
   387	    /* check new stack size */
   388	    if (size + n > BE_STACK_TOTAL_MAX) {
   389	        /* ensure the stack is enough when generating error messages. */
   390	        stack_resize(vm, size + 1);
   391	        be_raise(vm, "runtime_error", STACK_OVER_MSG(BE_STACK_TOTAL_MAX));
   392	    }
   393	    stack_resize(vm, size + n);
   394	}
   395	
   396	static void fixup_exceptstack(bvm* vm, struct bexecptframe* lbase)
   397	{
   398	    struct bexecptframe *base = be_stack_base(&vm->exceptstack);
   399	    if (lbase != base) { /* the address has changed when the stack is expanded */
   400	        struct bexecptframe *top = be_stack_top(&vm->exceptstack);
   401	        bbyte *begin = (bbyte*)&lbase->errjmp;
   402	        bbyte *end = (bbyte*)&(lbase + (top - base))->errjmp;
   403	        intptr_t offset = ptr_offset(base, lbase);
   404	        struct blongjmp *errjmp = vm->errjmp;
   405	        while (errjmp) {
   406	            bbyte *prev = (bbyte*)errjmp->prev;
   407	            if (prev >= begin && prev < end) {
   408	                fixup_ptr(prev, offset); /* fixup the prev pointer */
   409	                errjmp->prev = (struct blongjmp*)prev;
   410	            }
   411	            errjmp = (struct blongjmp*)prev;
   412	        }
   413	    }
   414	}
   415	
   416	/* set an exception handling recovery point. To do this, we have to
   417	 * push some VM states into the exception stack. */
   418	void be_except_block_setup(bvm *vm)
   419	{
   420	    struct bexecptframe *frame;
   421	    struct bexecptframe *lbase = be_stack_base(&vm->exceptstack);
   422	    be_stack_push(vm, &vm->exceptstack, NULL);
   423	    frame = be_stack_top(&vm->exceptstack);
   424	    frame->depth = be_stack_count(&vm->callstack); /* the call stack depth */
   425	    frame->ip = vm->ip; /* OP_EXBLK's next instruction pointer */
   426	    /* set longjmp() jump point */
   427	    frame->errjmp.status = 0;
   428	    frame->errjmp.prev = vm->errjmp; /* save long jump list */
   429	    vm->errjmp = &frame->errjmp;
   430	    fixup_exceptstack(vm, lbase);
   431	}
   432	
   433	/* resumes to the state of the previous frame when an exception occurs. */
   434	void be_except_block_resume(bvm *vm)
   435	{
   436	    int errorcode = vm->errjmp->status;
   437	    struct bexecptframe *frame = be_stack_top(&vm->exceptstack);
   438	    if (errorcode == BE_EXCEPTION) {
   439	        vm->errjmp = vm->errjmp->prev;
   440	        /* jump to except instruction */
   441	        vm->ip = frame->ip + IGET_sBx(frame->ip[-1]);
   442	        if (be_stack_count(&vm->callstack) > frame->depth) {
   443	            bvalue *top = vm->top;
   444	            bcallframe *cf = be_vector_at(&vm->callstack, frame->depth);
   445	            vm->top = cf->top;
   446	            vm->reg = cf->reg;
   447	            vm->cf = frame->depth ? cf - 1 : NULL;
   448	            be_vector_resize(vm, &vm->callstack, frame->depth);
   449	            /* copy the exception value and argument to the top of
   450	             * the current function */
   451	            vm->top[0] = top[0]; /* exception value */
   452	            vm->top[1] = top[1]; /* exception argument */
   453	        }
   454	        be_stack_pop(&vm->exceptstack);
   455	    } else { /* other errors cannot be catch by the except block */
   456	        /* find the next error handling location */
   457	        while (vm->errjmp == &frame->errjmp) {
   458	            vm->errjmp = vm->errjmp->prev;
   459	            be_stack_pop(&vm->exceptstack);
   460	            frame = be_stack_top(&vm->exceptstack);
   461	        }
   462	        be_throw(vm, errorcode); /* rethrow this exception */
   463	    }
   464	}
   465	
   466	/* only close the except block, no other operations */
   467	void be_except_block_close(bvm *vm, int count)
   468	{
   469	    struct bexecptframe *frame;
   470	    int size = be_stack_count(&vm->exceptstack);
   471	    be_assert(count > 0 && count <= size);
   472	    frame = be_vector_at(&vm->exceptstack, size - count);
   473	    vm->errjmp = frame->errjmp.prev;
   474	    be_vector_resize(vm, &vm->exceptstack, size - count);
   475	}
   476	
   477	void be_save_stacktrace(bvm *vm)
   478	{
   479	    bstack *stack = &vm->tracestack;
   480	    be_stack_clear(stack);
   481	    if (be_stack_count(&vm->callstack)) {
   482	        bcallframe *cf;
   483	        bcallframe *base = be_stack_base(&vm->callstack);
   484	        bcallframe *top = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
   485	        for (cf = base; cf <= top; ++cf) {
   486	            bcallsnapshot *st;
   487	            be_stack_push(vm, stack, NULL);
   488	            st = be_stack_top(stack);
   489	            st->func = *cf->func;
   490	            st->ip = cf == top ? vm->ip : cf[1].ip;
   491	        }
   492	    }
   493	}

   168	static void do_linehook(bvm *vm)
   169	{
   170	    bcallframe *cf = vm->cf;
   171	    bclosure *cl = var_toobj(cf->func);
   172	    int pc = cast_int(vm->ip - cl->proto->code);
   173	    if (!pc || pc > cf->lineinfo->endpc) {
   174	        while (pc > cf->lineinfo->endpc)
   175	            cf->lineinfo++;
   176	        be_callhook(vm, BE_HOOK_LINE);
   177	    } else {
   178	        blineinfo *linfo = cf->lineinfo;
   179	        blineinfo *base = cl->proto->lineinfo;
   180	        while (linfo > base && pc <= linfo[-1].endpc)
   181	            linfo--;
   182	        if (cf->lineinfo != linfo) {
   183	            cf->lineinfo = linfo;
   184	            be_callhook(vm, BE_HOOK_LINE);
   185	        }
   186	    }
   187	}

   190	/* Prepare the stack for the function/method call */
   191	/* `func` is a pointer to the function/method on the stack, it contains the closure before call and the result after the call */
   192	/* `nstackˋ is the stack depth used by the function (determined by compiler), we add BE_STACK_FREE_MIN as a safety margin */
   193	static void precall(bvm *vm, bvalue *func, int nstack, int mode)
   194	{
   195	    bcallframe *cf;
   196	    int expan = nstack + BE_STACK_FREE_MIN; /* `expan` is the minimum required space on the stack */
   197	    if (vm->stacktop < func + expan) {  /* do we have too little space left on the stack? */
   198	        size_t fpos = func - vm->stack;  /* compute offset of `func` from base stack, in case stack is reallocated and base address changes */
   199	        be_stack_expansion(vm, expan);  /* expand stack (vector object), warning stack address changes */
   200	        func = vm->stack + fpos;  /* recompute `func` address with new stack address */
   201	    }
   202	    be_stack_push(vm, &vm->callstack, NULL);  /* push a NULL value on callstack */
   203	    cf = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);  /* get address of new callframe at top of callstack */
   204	    cf->func = func - mode;
   205	    cf->top = vm->top;  /* save previous stack top */
   206	    cf->reg = vm->reg;  /* save previous stack base */
   207	    vm->reg = func + 1;  /* new stack base is right after function */
   208	    vm->top = vm->reg + nstack; /* new stack top is above the registers used by the function, so we don´t mess with them */
   209	    vm->cf = cf;  /* set new current callframe */
   210	}

   212	/* Prepare call of closure, setting the instruction pointer (ip) */
   213	static void push_closure(bvm *vm, bvalue *func, int nstack, int mode)
   214	{
   215	    bclosure *cl = var_toobj(func);
   216	    precall(vm, func, nstack, mode);
   217	    vm->cf->ip = vm->ip;
   218	    vm->cf->status = NONE_FLAG;
   219	    vm->ip = cl->proto->code;
   220	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
   221	    vm->cf->lineinfo = cl->proto->lineinfo;
   222	    be_callhook(vm, BE_HOOK_CALL);
   223	#endif
   224	}

   235	static bbool obj2bool(bvm *vm, bvalue *var)
   236	{
   237	    binstance *obj = var_toobj(var);
   238	    bstring *tobool = str_literal(vm, "tobool");
   239	    /* get operator method */
   240	    int type = be_instance_member(vm, obj, tobool, vm->top);
   241	    if (type != BE_NONE && type != BE_NIL) {
   242	        vm->top[1] = *var; /* move self to argv[0] */
   243	        be_dofunc(vm, vm->top, 1); /* call method 'tobool' */
   244	        /* check the return value */
   245	        check_bool(vm, obj, "tobool");
   246	        return var_tobool(vm->top);
   247	    }
   248	    return btrue;
   249	}

   251	bbool be_value2bool(bvm *vm, bvalue *v)
   252	{
   253	    switch (var_basetype(v)) {

   256	    case BE_BOOL:
   257	        return var_tobool(v);
   258	    case BE_INT:
   259	        return val2bool(v->v.i);
   260	    case BE_REAL:
   261	        return val2bool(v->v.r);
   262	    case BE_INSTANCE:
   263	        return obj2bool(vm, v);
   264	    default:
   265	        return btrue;
   266	    }
   267	}

   318	static bbool object_eqop(bvm *vm,
   319	    const char *op, bbool iseq, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   320	{
   321	    binstance *o = var_toobj(a);
   322	    bvalue self = *a, other = *b;
   323	    bbool isself = var_isinstance(b) && o == var_toobj(b);
   324	    /* first, try to call the overloaded operator of the object */
   325	    int type = be_instance_member(vm, o, be_newstr(vm, op), vm->top);
   326	    if (basetype(type) == BE_FUNCTION) { /* call method */
   327	        bvalue *top = vm->top;
   328	        top[1] = self;  /* move self to argv[0] */
   329	        top[2] = other; /* move other to argv[1] */
   330	        be_incrtop(vm); /* prevent collection results */
   331	        be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'item' */
   332	        be_stackpop(vm, 1);
   333	        check_bool(vm, o, op); /* check return value */
   334	        return var_tobool(vm->top); /* copy result to dst */
   335	    }
   336	    /* the default equal operation rule */
   337	    return iseq == isself; /* check object self */
   338	}

   340	static void object_binop(bvm *vm, const char *op, bvalue self, bvalue other)
   341	{
   342	    bvalue *top = vm->top;
   343	    /* get operator method (possible GC) */
   344	    obj_method(vm, &self, be_newstr(vm, op), vm->top);
   345	    top[1] = self; /* move self to argv[0] */
   346	    top[2] = other; /* move other to argv[1] */
   347	    be_incrtop(vm); /* prevent collection results */
   348	    be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'item' */
   349	    be_stackpop(vm, 1);
   350	}

   397	static void make_range(bvm *vm, bvalue lower, bvalue upper)
   398	{
   399	    /* get method 'item' (possible GC) */
   400	    int idx = be_builtin_find(vm, str_literal(vm, "range"));
   401	    bvalue *top = vm->top;
   402	    top[0] = *be_global_var(vm, idx);
   403	    top[1] = lower; /* move lower to argv[0] */
   404	    top[2] = upper; /* move upper to argv[1] */
   405	    vm->top += 3; /* prevent collection results */
   406	    be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'item' */
   407	    vm->top -= 3;
   408	}
   409	
   410	static void connect_str(bvm *vm, bstring *a, bvalue *b)
   411	{
   412	    bstring *s;
   413	    if (var_isstr(b)) {
   414	        s = be_strcat(vm, a, var_tostr(b));
   415	        var_setstr(vm->top, s);
   416	    } else {
   417	        *vm->top++ = *b;
   418	        be_val2str(vm, -1);
   419	        b = vm->top - 1;
   420	        s = be_strcat(vm, a, var_tostr(b));
   421	        var_setstr(b, s);
   422	        vm->top -= 1;
   423	    }
   424	}
   425	
   426	BERRY_API bvm* be_vm_new(void)
   427	{
   428	    bvm *vm = be_os_malloc(sizeof(bvm));
   429	    be_assert(vm != NULL);
   430	    memset(vm, 0, sizeof(bvm)); /* clear all members */
   431	    be_gc_init(vm);
   432	    be_string_init(vm);
   433	    be_stack_init(vm, &vm->callstack, sizeof(bcallframe));
   434	    be_stack_init(vm, &vm->refstack, sizeof(binstance*));
   435	    be_stack_init(vm, &vm->exceptstack, sizeof(struct bexecptframe));
   436	    be_stack_init(vm, &vm->tracestack, sizeof(bcallsnapshot));
   437	    vm->stack = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(bvalue) * BE_STACK_FREE_MIN);
   438	    vm->stacktop = vm->stack + BE_STACK_FREE_MIN;
   439	    vm->reg = vm->stack;
   440	    vm->top = vm->reg;
   441	    be_globalvar_init(vm);
   442	    be_gc_setpause(vm, 1);
   443	    be_loadlibs(vm);
   444	    vm->compopt = 0;
   445	#if BE_USE_OBSERVABILITY_HOOK
   446	    vm->obshook = NULL;
   447	#endif
   448	    return vm;
   449	}
   450	
   451	BERRY_API void be_vm_delete(bvm *vm)
   452	{
   453	    be_gc_deleteall(vm);
   454	    be_string_deleteall(vm);
   455	    be_stack_delete(vm, &vm->callstack);
   456	    be_stack_delete(vm, &vm->refstack);
   457	    be_stack_delete(vm, &vm->exceptstack);
   458	    be_stack_delete(vm, &vm->tracestack);
   459	    be_free(vm, vm->stack, (vm->stacktop - vm->stack) * sizeof(bvalue));
   460	    be_globalvar_deinit(vm);
   461	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
   462	    /* free native hook */
   463	    if (var_istype(&vm->hook, BE_COMPTR))
   464	        be_free(vm, var_toobj(&vm->hook), sizeof(struct bhookblock));
   465	#endif
   466	    /* free VM structure */
   467	    be_os_free(vm);
   468	}
   469	
   470	static void vm_exec(bvm *vm)
   471	{
   472	    bclosure *clos;
   473	    bvalue *ktab, *reg;
   474	    binstruction ins;
   475	    vm->cf->status |= BASE_FRAME;
   476	newframe: /* a new call frame */
   477	    be_assert(var_isclosure(vm->cf->func));
   478	    clos = var_toobj(vm->cf->func);  /* `clos` is the current function/closure */
   479	    ktab = clos->proto->ktab;  /* `ktab` is the current constant table */
   480	    reg = vm->reg;  /* `reg` is the current stack base for the callframe */
   481	    vm_exec_loop() {
   482	        opcase(LDNIL): {
   483	            var_setnil(RA());
   484	            dispatch();
   485	        }
   486	        opcase(LDBOOL): {
   487	            bvalue *v = RA();
   488	            var_setbool(v, IGET_RKB(ins));
   489	            if (IGET_RKC(ins)) { /* skip next instruction */
   490	                vm->ip += 1;
   491	            }
   492	            dispatch();
   493	        }
   494	        opcase(LDINT): {
   495	            bvalue *v = RA();
   496	            var_setint(v, IGET_sBx(ins));
   497	            dispatch();
   498	        }
   499	        opcase(LDCONST): {
   500	            bvalue *dst = RA();
   501	            *dst = ktab[IGET_Bx(ins)];
   502	            dispatch();
   503	        }
   504	        opcase(GETGBL): {
   505	            bvalue *v = RA();
   506	            int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   507	            *v = *be_global_var(vm, idx);
   508	            dispatch();
   509	        }
   510	        opcase(GETNGBL): {  /* get Global by name */
   511	            bvalue *v = RA();
   512	            bvalue *b = RKB();
   513	            if (var_isstr(b)) {
   514	                bstring *name = var_tostr(b);
   515	                int idx = be_global_find(vm, name);
   516	                if (idx > -1) {
   517	                    *v = *be_global_var(vm, idx);
   518	                } else {
   519	                    vm_error(vm, "attribute_error", "'%s' undeclared", str(name));
   520	                }
   521	            } else {
   522	                vm_error(vm, "internal_error", "global name must be a string");
   523	            }
   524	            dispatch();
   525	        }
   526	        opcase(SETNGBL): {  /* set Global by name */
   527	            bvalue *v = RA();
   528	            bvalue *b = RKB();
   529	            if (var_isstr(b)) {
   530	                bstring *name = var_tostr(b);
   531	                int idx = be_global_new(vm, name);
   532	                *be_global_var(vm, idx) = *v;
   533	            } else {
   534	                vm_error(vm, "internal_error", "global name must be a string");
   535	            }
   536	            dispatch();
   537	        }
   538	        opcase(SETGBL): {
   539	            bvalue *v = RA();
   540	            int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   541	            *be_global_var(vm, idx) = *v;
   542	            dispatch();
   543	        }
   544	        opcase(GETUPV): {
   545	            bvalue *v = RA();
   546	            int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   547	            be_assert(*clos->upvals != NULL);
   548	            *v = *clos->upvals[idx]->value;
   549	            dispatch();
   550	        }
   551	        opcase(SETUPV): {
   552	            bvalue *v = RA();
   553	            int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   554	            be_assert(*clos->upvals != NULL);
   555	            *clos->upvals[idx]->value = *v;
   556	            dispatch();
   557	        }
   558	        opcase(MOVE): {
   559	            bvalue *dst = RA();
   560	            *dst = *RKB();
   561	            dispatch();
   562	        }
   563	        opcase(ADD): {
   564	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   565	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   566	                var_setint(dst, ibinop(+, a, b));
   567	            } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) {
   568	                breal x = var2real(a), y = var2real(b);
   569	                var_setreal(dst, x + y);
   570	            } else if (var_isstr(a) && var_isstr(b)) { /* strcat */
   571	                bstring *s = be_strcat(vm, var_tostr(a), var_tostr(b));
   572	                reg = vm->reg;
   573	                dst = RA();
   574	                var_setstr(dst, s);
   575	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   576	                ins_binop(vm, "+", ins);
   577	            } else {
   578	                binop_error(vm, "+", a, b);
   579	            }
   580	            dispatch();
   581	        }
   582	        opcase(SUB): {
   583	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   584	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   585	                var_setint(dst, ibinop(-, a, b));
   586	            } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) {
   587	                breal x = var2real(a), y = var2real(b);
   588	                var_setreal(dst, x - y);
   589	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   590	                ins_binop(vm, "-", ins);
   591	            } else {
   592	                binop_error(vm, "-", a, b);
   593	            }
   594	            dispatch();
   595	        }
   596	        opcase(MUL): {
   597	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   598	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   599	                var_setint(dst, ibinop(*, a, b));
   600	            } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) {
   601	                breal x = var2real(a), y = var2real(b);
   602	                var_setreal(dst, x * y);
   603	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   604	                ins_binop(vm, "*", ins);
   605	            } else {
   606	                binop_error(vm, "*", a, b);
   607	            }
   608	            dispatch();
   609	        }
   610	        opcase(DIV): {
   611	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   612	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   613	                bint x = var_toint(a), y = var_toint(b);
   614	                if (y == 0) {
   615	                    vm_error(vm, "divzero_error", "division by zero");
   616	                } else {
   617	                    var_setint(dst, x / y);
   618	                }
   619	            } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) {
   620	                breal x = var2real(a), y = var2real(b);
   621	                if (y == cast(breal, 0)) {
   622	                    vm_error(vm, "divzero_error", "division by zero");
   623	                }
   624	                var_setreal(dst, x / y);
   625	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   626	                ins_binop(vm, "/", ins);
   627	            } else {
   628	                binop_error(vm, "/", a, b);
   629	            }
   630	            dispatch();
   631	        }
   632	        opcase(MOD): {
   633	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   634	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   635	                var_setint(dst, ibinop(%, a, b));
   636	            } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) {
   637	                var_setreal(dst, mathfunc(fmod)(var_toreal(a), var_toreal(b)));
   638	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   639	                ins_binop(vm, "%", ins);
   640	            } else {
   641	                binop_error(vm, "%", a, b);
   642	            }
   643	            dispatch();
   644	        }
   645	        opcase(LT): {
   646	            bbool res = be_vm_islt(vm, RKB(), RKC());
   647	            bvalue *dst;
   648	            reg = vm->reg;
   649	            dst = RA();
   650	            var_setbool(dst, res);
   651	            dispatch();
   652	        }
   653	        opcase(LE): {
   654	            bbool res = be_vm_isle(vm, RKB(), RKC());
   655	            bvalue *dst;
   656	            reg = vm->reg;
   657	            dst = RA();
   658	            var_setbool(dst, res);
   659	            dispatch();
   660	        }
   661	        opcase(EQ): {
   662	            bbool res = be_vm_iseq(vm, RKB(), RKC());
   663	            bvalue *dst;
   664	            reg = vm->reg;
   665	            dst = RA();
   666	            var_setbool(dst, res);
   667	            dispatch();
   668	        }
   669	        opcase(NE): {
   670	            bbool res = be_vm_isneq(vm, RKB(), RKC());
   671	            bvalue *dst;
   672	            reg = vm->reg;
   673	            dst = RA();
   674	            var_setbool(dst, res);
   675	            dispatch();
   676	        }
   677	        opcase(GT): {
   678	            bbool res = be_vm_isgt(vm, RKB(), RKC());
   679	            bvalue *dst;
   680	            reg = vm->reg;
   681	            dst = RA();
   682	            var_setbool(dst, res);
   683	            dispatch();
   684	        }
   685	        opcase(GE): {
   686	            bbool res = be_vm_isge(vm, RKB(), RKC());
   687	            bvalue *dst;
   688	            reg = vm->reg;
   689	            dst = RA();
   690	            var_setbool(dst, res);
   691	            dispatch();
   692	        }
   693	        opcase(CONNECT): {
   694	            bvalue *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   695	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   696	                make_range(vm, *RKB(), *RKC());
   697	            } else if (var_isstr(a)) {
   698	                connect_str(vm, var_tostr(a), b);
   699	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   700	                object_binop(vm, "..", *RKB(), *RKC());
   701	            } else {
   702	                binop_error(vm, "..", RKB(), RKC());
   703	            }
   704	            reg = vm->reg;
   705	            *RA() = *vm->top; /* copy result to R(A) */
   706	            dispatch();
   707	        }
   708	        opcase(AND): {
   709	            bitwise_block(&);
   710	            dispatch();
   711	        }
   712	        opcase(OR): {
   713	            bitwise_block(|);
   714	            dispatch();
   715	        }
   716	        opcase(XOR): {
   717	            bitwise_block(^);
   718	            dispatch();
   719	        }
   720	        opcase(SHL): {
   721	            bitwise_block(<<);
   722	            dispatch();
   723	        }
   724	        opcase(SHR): {
   725	            bitwise_block(>>);
   726	            dispatch();
   727	        }
   728	        opcase(NEG): {
   729	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB();
   730	            if (var_isint(a)) {
   731	                var_setint(dst, -a->v.i);
   732	            } else if (var_isreal(a)) {
   733	                var_setreal(dst, -a->v.r);
   734	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   735	                ins_unop(vm, "-*", *RKB());
   736	                reg = vm->reg;
   737	                *RA() = *vm->top; /* copy result to dst */
   738	            } else {
   739	                unop_error(vm, "-", a);
   740	            }
   741	            dispatch();
   742	        }
   743	        opcase(FLIP): {
   744	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB();
   745	            if (var_isint(a)) {
   746	                var_setint(dst, ~a->v.i);
   747	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   748	                ins_unop(vm, "~", *RKB());
   749	                reg = vm->reg;
   750	                *RA() = *vm->top; /* copy result to dst */
   751	            } else {
   752	                unop_error(vm, "~", a);
   753	            }
   754	            dispatch();
   755	        }
   756	        opcase(JMP): {
   757	            vm->ip += IGET_sBx(ins);
   758	            dispatch();
   759	        }
   760	        opcase(JMPT): {
   761	            if (be_value2bool(vm, RA())) {
   762	                vm->ip += IGET_sBx(ins);
   763	            }
   764	            dispatch();
   765	        }
   766	        opcase(JMPF): {
   767	            if (!be_value2bool(vm, RA())) {
   768	                vm->ip += IGET_sBx(ins);
   769	            }
   770	            dispatch();
   771	        }
   772	        opcase(CLOSURE): {
   773	            bvalue *dst;
   774	            bproto *p = clos->proto->ptab[IGET_Bx(ins)];
   775	            bclosure *cl = be_newclosure(vm, p->nupvals);
   776	            cl->proto = p;
   777	            reg = vm->reg;
   778	            dst = RA();
   779	            var_setclosure(dst, cl);
   780	            be_initupvals(vm, cl);
   781	            dispatch();
   782	        }
   783	        opcase(CLASS): {
   784	            bclass *c = var_toobj(ktab + IGET_Bx(ins));
   785	            be_class_upvalue_init(vm, c);
   786	            dispatch();
   787	        }
   788	        opcase(GETMBR): {
   789	            bvalue a_temp;  /* copy result to a temp variable because the stack may be relocated in virtual member calls */
   790	            bvalue *b = RKB(), *c = RKC();
   791	            if (var_isinstance(b) && var_isstr(c)) {
   792	                obj_attribute(vm, b, var_tostr(c), &a_temp);
   793	                reg = vm->reg;
   794	            } else if (var_isclass(b) && var_isstr(c)) {
   795	                class_attribute(vm, b, c, &a_temp);
   796	                reg = vm->reg;
   797	            } else if (var_ismodule(b) && var_isstr(c)) {
   798	                module_attribute(vm, b, c, &a_temp);
   799	                reg = vm->reg;
   800	            } else {
   801	                attribute_error(vm, "attribute", b, c);
   802	                a_temp = *RA();     /* avoid gcc warning for uninitialized variable a_temp, this code is never reached */
   803	            }
   804	            bvalue *a = RA();
   805	            *a = a_temp;    /* assign the resul to the specified register on the updated stack */
   806	            dispatch();
   807	        }
   808	        opcase(GETMET): {
   809	            bvalue a_temp;  /* copy result to a temp variable because the stack may be relocated in virtual member calls */
   810	            bvalue *b = RKB(), *c = RKC();
   811	            if (var_isinstance(b) && var_isstr(c)) {
   812	                binstance *obj = var_toobj(b);
   813	                int type = obj_attribute(vm, b, var_tostr(c), &a_temp);
   814	                reg = vm->reg;
   815	                bvalue *a = RA();
   816	                *a = a_temp;
   817	                if (basetype(type) == BE_FUNCTION) {
   818	                    /* check if the object is a superinstance, if so get the lowest possible subclass */
   819	                    while (obj->sub) {
   820	                        obj = obj->sub;
   821	                    }
   822	                    var_setinstance(&a[1], obj);  /* replace superinstance by lowest subinstance */
   823	                } else {
   824	                    vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   825	                        "class '%s' has no method '%s'",
   826	                        str(be_instance_name(obj)), str(var_tostr(c)));
   827	                }
   828	            } else if (var_ismodule(b) && var_isstr(c)) {
   829	                module_attribute(vm, b, c, &a_temp);
   830	                reg = vm->reg;
   831	                bvalue *a = RA();
   832	                a[1] = a_temp;
   833	                var_settype(a, NOT_METHOD);
   834	            } else {
   835	                attribute_error(vm, "method", b, c);
   836	            }
   837	            dispatch();
   838	        }
   839	        opcase(SETMBR): {
   840	            bvalue *a = RA(), *b = RKB(), *c = RKC();
   841	            if (var_isinstance(a) && var_isstr(b)) {
   842	                binstance *obj = var_toobj(a);
   843	                bstring *attr = var_tostr(b);
   844	                if (!be_instance_setmember(vm, obj, attr, c)) {
   845	                    vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   846	                        "class '%s' cannot assign to attribute '%s'",
   847	                        str(be_instance_name(obj)), str(attr));
   848	                }
   849	                dispatch();
   850	            }
   851	            if (var_isclass(a) && var_isstr(b)) {
   852	                bclass *obj = var_toobj(a);
   853	                bstring *attr = var_tostr(b);
   854	                if (!be_class_setmember(vm, obj, attr, c)) {
   855	                    vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   856	                        "class '%s' cannot assign to static attribute '%s'",
   857	                        str(be_class_name(obj)), str(attr));
   858	                }
   859	                dispatch();
   860	            }
   861	            if (var_ismodule(a) && var_isstr(b)) {
   862	                bmodule *obj = var_toobj(a);
   863	                bstring *attr = var_tostr(b);
   864	                if (be_module_setmember(vm, obj, attr, c)) {
   865	                    dispatch();
   866	                } else {
   867	                    // fall through exception below
   868	                }
   869	            }
   870	            attribute_error(vm, "writable attribute", a, b);
   871	            dispatch();
   872	        }
   873	        opcase(GETIDX): {
   874	            bvalue *b = RKB(), *c = RKC();
   875	            if (var_isinstance(b)) {
   876	                bvalue *top = vm->top;
   877	                /* get method 'item' */
   878	                obj_method(vm, b, str_literal(vm, "item"), vm->top);
   879	                top[1] = *b; /* move object to argv[0] */
   880	                top[2] = *c; /* move key to argv[1] */
   881	                vm->top += 3;   /* prevent collection results */
   882	                be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'item' */
   883	                vm->top -= 3;
   884	                reg = vm->reg;
   885	                *RA() = *vm->top;   /* copy result to R(A) */
   886	            } else if (var_isstr(b)) {
   887	                bstring *s = be_strindex(vm, var_tostr(b), c);
   888	                reg = vm->reg;
   889	                var_setstr(RA(), s);
   890	            } else {
   891	                vm_error(vm, "type_error",
   892	                    "value '%s' does not support subscriptable",
   893	                    be_vtype2str(b));
   894	            }
   895	            dispatch();
   896	        }
   897	        opcase(SETIDX): {
   898	            bvalue *a = RA(), *b = RKB(), *c = RKC();
   899	            if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   900	                bvalue *top = vm->top;
   901	                /* get method 'setitem' */
   902	                obj_method(vm, a, str_literal(vm, "setitem"), vm->top);
   903	                top[1] = *a; /* move object to argv[0] */
   904	                top[2] = *b; /* move key to argv[1] */
   905	                top[3] = *c; /* move src to argv[2] */
   906	                vm->top += 4;
   907	                be_dofunc(vm, top, 3); /* call method 'setitem' */
   908	                vm->top -= 4;
   909	                reg = vm->reg;
   910	            } else {
   911	                vm_error(vm, "type_error",
   912	                    "value '%s' does not support index assignment",
   913	                    be_vtype2str(a));
   914	            }
   915	            dispatch();
   916	        }
   917	        opcase(SETSUPER): {
   918	            bvalue *a = RA(), *b = RKB();
   919	            if (var_isclass(a) && var_isclass(b)) {
   920	                bclass *obj = var_toobj(a);
   921	                be_class_setsuper(obj, var_toobj(b));
   922	            } else {
   923	                vm_error(vm, "type_error",
   924	                    "value '%s' does not support set super",
   925	                    be_vtype2str(b));
   926	            }
   927	            dispatch();
   928	        }
   929	        opcase(CLOSE): {
   930	            be_upvals_close(vm, RA());
   931	            dispatch();
   932	        }
   933	        opcase(IMPORT): {
   934	            bvalue *b = RKB();
   935	            if (var_isstr(b)) {
   936	                bstring *name = var_tostr(b);
   937	                int res = be_module_load(vm, name);
   938	                reg = vm->reg;
   939	                switch (res) {
   940	                case BE_OK: /* find the module */
   941	                    be_stackpop(vm, 1);
   942	                    *RA() = *vm->top;
   943	                    break;
   944	                case BE_EXCEPTION: /* pop the exception value and message */
   945	                    be_pop(vm, 2);
   946	                    be_throw(vm, BE_EXCEPTION);
   947	                    break;

   949	                    vm_error(vm, "import_error", "module '%s' not found", str(name));

   953	                    "import '%s' does not support import",

   960	            int i = 0, ecnt = IGET_RKB(ins), vcnt = IGET_RKC(ins);
   961	            while (i < ecnt && !be_vm_iseq(vm, top, base + i)) {
   962	                ++i;
   963	            }
   964	            if (!ecnt || i < ecnt) { /* exception catched */
   965	                base = RA(), top = vm->top;
   966	                for (i = 0; i < vcnt; ++i) {
   967	                    *base++ = *top++;
   968	                }

   974	            if (IGET_RA(ins) < 2) {  /* A==2 means no arguments are passed to RAISE, i.e. rethrow with current exception */

   985	            dispatch();

   987	        opcase(EXBLK): {
   988	            if (!IGET_RA(ins)) {
   989	                be_except_block_setup(vm);
   990	                if (be_setjmp(vm->errjmp->b)) {
   991	                    be_except_block_resume(vm);

  1000	        opcase(CALL): {

  1038	                //     bvalue *top_save = vm->top;  /* save original stack, we need fresh slots to create the 'list' instance */

  1111	static void prep_closure(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc, int mode)
  1112	{
  1113	    bvalue *v, *end;
  1114	    bproto *proto = var2cl(reg)->proto;
  1115	    push_closure(vm, reg, proto->nstack, mode);
  1116	    v = vm->reg + argc;
  1117	    end = vm->reg + proto->argc;
  1118	    for (; v <= end; ++v) {
  1119	        var_setnil(v);
  1120	    }
  1121	    if (proto->varg) {  /* there are vararg at the last argument, build the list */
  1122	        /* code below uses mostly low-level calls for performance */
  1123	        be_stack_require(vm, argc + 2);   /* make sure we don't overflow the stack */
  1124	        bvalue *top_save = vm->top;  /* save original stack, we need fresh slots to create the 'list' instance */
  1125	        vm->top = v;  /* move top of stack right after last argument */
  1126	        be_newobject(vm, "list");  /* this creates 2 objects on stack: list instance, BE_LIST object */
  1127	        blist *list = var_toobj(vm->top-1);  /* get low-level BE_LIST structure */
  1128	        v = vm->reg + proto->argc - 1;  /* last argument */
  1129	        for (; v < vm->reg + argc; v++) {
  1130	            be_list_push(vm, list, v); /* push all varargs into list */       
  1131	        }
  1132	        *(vm->reg + proto->argc - 1) = *(vm->top-2);  /* change the vararg argument to now contain the list instance */
  1133	        vm->top = top_save;  /* restore top of stack pointer */
  1134	    }
  1135	}
  1136	
  1137	static void do_closure(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc)
  1138	{
  1139	    // bvalue *v, *end;
  1140	    // bproto *proto = var2cl(reg)->proto;
  1141	    // push_closure(vm, reg, proto->nstack, 0);
  1142	    // v = vm->reg + argc;
  1143	    // end = vm->reg + proto->argc;
  1144	    // for (; v <= end; ++v) {
  1145	    //     var_setnil(v);
  1146	    // }
  1147	    prep_closure(vm, reg, argc, 0);
  1148	    vm_exec(vm);
  1149	}
  1150	
  1151	static void do_ntvclos(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc)
  1152	{
  1153	    bntvclos *f = var_toobj(reg);
  1154	    push_native(vm, reg, argc, 0);
  1155	    f->f(vm); /* call C primitive function */
  1156	    ret_native(vm);
  1157	}
  1158	
  1159	static void do_ntvfunc(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc)
  1160	{
  1161	    bntvfunc f = var_tontvfunc(reg);
  1162	    push_native(vm, reg, argc, 0);
  1163	    f(vm); /* call C primitive function */
  1164	    ret_native(vm);
  1165	}
  1166	
  1167	static void do_class(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc)
  1168	{
  1169	    if (be_class_newobj(vm, var_toobj(reg), reg, ++argc, 0)) {
  1170	        be_incrtop(vm);
  1171	        be_dofunc(vm, reg + 1, argc);
  1172	        be_stackpop(vm, 1);
  1173	    }
  1174	}
  1175	
  1176	void be_dofunc(bvm *vm, bvalue *v, int argc)
  1177	{
  1178	    be_assert(vm->reg <= v && v < vm->stacktop);
  1179	    be_assert(vm->stack <= vm->reg && vm->reg < vm->stacktop);
  1180	    switch (var_type(v)) {
  1181	    case BE_CLASS: do_class(vm, v, argc); break;
  1182	    case BE_CLOSURE: do_closure(vm, v, argc); break;
  1183	    case BE_NTVCLOS: do_ntvclos(vm, v, argc); break;
  1184	    case BE_NTVFUNC: do_ntvfunc(vm, v, argc); break;
  1185	    default: call_error(vm, v);
  1186	    }
  1187	}

    79	static void match_token(bparser *parser, btokentype type)
    80	{
    81	    if (next_type(parser) != type) { /* error when token is no match */
    82	        btoken *token = &next_token(parser);
    83	        const char *s1 = be_tokentype2str(type);
    84	        const char *s2 = be_token2str(parser->vm, token);
    85	        push_error(parser, "expected '%s' before '%s'", s1, s2);
    86	    }
    87	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip this token */
    88	}

    92	static void match_notoken(bparser *parser, btokentype type)
    93	{

    96	            "expected statement before '%s'", token2str(parser));
    97	    }
    98	}

   100	/* check that if the expdesc is a symbol, it is a valid one or raise an exception */
   101	static void check_symbol(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   102	{

   109	/* check that the value in `e` is valid for a variable, i.e. contains a value or a valid symbol */
   110	static void check_var(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   111	{
   112	    check_symbol(parser, e); /* check the token is a symbol */
   113	    if (e->type == ETVOID) { /* error when symbol is undefined */
   114	        int line = parser->lexer.linenumber;
   115	        parser->lexer.linenumber = parser->lexer.lastline;
   116	        push_error(parser,
   117	            "'%s' undeclared (first use in this function)", str(e->v.s));
   118	        parser->lexer.linenumber = line;
   119	    }
   120	}

   179	/* Initialize bblockinfo structure */
   180	static void begin_block(bfuncinfo *finfo, bblockinfo *binfo, int type)
   181	{
   182	    binfo->prev = finfo->binfo; /* save previous block */
   183	    finfo->binfo = binfo; /* tell parser this is the current block */
   184	    binfo->type = (bbyte)type;
   185	    binfo->hasupval = 0;
   186	    binfo->beginpc = finfo->pc; /* set starting pc for this block */
   187	    binfo->nactlocals = (bbyte)be_list_count(finfo->local); /* count number of local variables in previous block */
   188	    if (type & BLOCK_LOOP) {
   189	        binfo->breaklist = NO_JUMP;
   190	        binfo->continuelist = NO_JUMP;
   191	    }
   192	}
   193	
   194	static void end_block_ex(bparser *parser, int beginpc)
   195	{
   196	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   197	    bblockinfo *binfo = finfo->binfo;
   198	    be_code_close(finfo, 0); /* close upvalues */
   199	    if (binfo->type & BLOCK_LOOP) {
   200	        be_code_jumpto(finfo, binfo->beginpc);
   201	        be_code_patchjump(finfo, binfo->breaklist);
   202	        be_code_patchlist(finfo, binfo->continuelist, binfo->beginpc);
   203	    }
   204	    end_varinfo(parser, beginpc);
   205	    be_list_resize(parser->vm, finfo->local, binfo->nactlocals); /* remove local variables from this block, they are now out of scope */
   206	    finfo->freereg = binfo->nactlocals; /* adjust first free register accordingly */
   207	    finfo->binfo = binfo->prev; /* restore previous block */
   208	}

   210	static void end_block(bparser *parser)
   211	{
   212	    end_block_ex(parser, -1);
