   241	    proto->source = parser_source(parser); /* keep a copy of source for function */
   242	    finfo->local = be_list_new(vm); /* list for local variables */
   243	    var_setlist(vm->top, finfo->local); /* push list of local variables on the stack (avoid gc) */
   244	    be_stackpush(vm);
   245	    finfo->upval = be_map_new(vm); /* push a map for upvals on stack */
   246	    var_setmap(vm->top, finfo->upval);
   247	    be_stackpush(vm);
   248	    finfo->prev = parser->finfo; /* init finfo */
   249	    finfo->lexer = &parser->lexer;
   250	    finfo->proto = proto;
   251	    finfo->freereg = 0;
   252	    finfo->binfo = NULL;
   253	    finfo->pc = 0;
   254	    finfo->flags = 0;
   255	    parser->finfo = finfo;
   256	#if BE_DEBUG_RUNTIME_INFO
   257	    be_vector_init(vm, &finfo->linevec, sizeof(blineinfo));
   258	    proto->lineinfo = be_vector_data(&finfo->linevec);
   259	    proto->nlineinfo = be_vector_capacity(&finfo->linevec);
   260	#endif
   261	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO
   262	    be_vector_init(vm, &finfo->varvec, sizeof(bvarinfo));
   263	    proto->varinfo = be_vector_data(&finfo->varvec);
   264	    proto->nvarinfo = be_vector_capacity(&finfo->varvec);
   265	#endif
   266	    begin_block(finfo, binfo, 0);
   267	}
   268	
   269	/* compute the upval structure */
   270	static void setupvals(bfuncinfo *finfo)
   271	{
   272	    bproto *proto = finfo->proto;
   273	    int nupvals = be_map_count(finfo->upval);
   274	    if (nupvals) {
   275	        bmapnode *node;
   276	        bmap *map = finfo->upval;
   277	        bmapiter iter = be_map_iter();
   278	        bupvaldesc *upvals = be_malloc(
   279	                finfo->lexer->vm, sizeof(bupvaldesc) * nupvals);
   280	        while ((node = be_map_next(map, &iter)) != NULL) {
   281	            uint32_t v = (uint32_t)var_toint(&node->value);
   282	            bupvaldesc *uv = upvals + upval_index(v);
   283	            uv->idx = upval_target(v);
   284	            uv->instack = upval_instack(v);
   285	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO
   286	            uv->name = var_tostr(&node->key);
   287	#endif
   288	        }
   289	        proto->upvals = upvals;
   290	        proto->nupvals = (bbyte)nupvals;
   291	    }
   292	}
   293	
   294	/* Function is complete, finalize bproto */
   295	static void end_func(bparser *parser)
   296	{
   297	    bvm *vm = parser->vm;
   298	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   299	    bproto *proto = finfo->proto;
   300	
   301	    be_code_ret(finfo, NULL); /* append a return to last code */
   302	    end_block(parser); /* close block */
   303	    setupvals(finfo); /* close upvals */
   304	    proto->code = be_vector_release(vm, &finfo->code); /* compact all vectors and return NULL if empty */
   305	    proto->codesize = finfo->pc;
   306	    proto->ktab = be_vector_release(vm, &finfo->kvec);
   307	    proto->nconst = be_vector_count(&finfo->kvec);
   308	    proto->ptab = be_vector_release(vm, &finfo->pvec);
   309	    proto->nproto = be_vector_count(&finfo->pvec);
   310	#if BE_DEBUG_RUNTIME_INFO
   311	    proto->lineinfo = be_vector_release(vm, &finfo->linevec);
   312	    proto->nlineinfo = be_vector_count(&finfo->linevec);
   313	#endif
   314	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO
   315	    proto->varinfo = be_vector_release(vm, &finfo->varvec);
   316	    proto->nvarinfo = be_vector_count(&finfo->varvec);
   317	#endif
   318	    parser->finfo = parser->finfo->prev; /* restore previous `finfo` */
   319	    be_stackpop(vm, 2); /* pop upval and local */
   320	}
   321	
   322	/* is the next token a binary operator? If yes return the operator or `OP_NOT_BINARY` */
   323	static btokentype get_binop(bparser *parser)
   324	{
   325	    btokentype op = next_type(parser);
   326	    if (op >= OptAdd && op <= OptOr) {
   327	        return op;
   328	    }
   329	    return OP_NOT_BINARY;
   330	}
   331	
   332	/* is the next token a unary operator? If yes return the operator or `OP_NOT_BINARY` */
   333	/* operator 'negative' 'not' and 'flip' */
   334	static btokentype get_unary_op(bparser *parser)
   335	{
   336	    btokentype op = next_type(parser);
   337	    if (op == OptSub || op == OptNot || op == OptFlip) {
   338	        return op; /* operator 'negative' 'not' and 'flip' */
   339	    }
   340	    return OP_NOT_UNARY;
   341	}
   342	
   343	/* is the next token an assignment operator? If yes return the operator or `OP_NOT_BINARY` */
   344	/* `=`, `+=`, ... `>>=` */
   345	static btokentype get_assign_op(bparser *parser)
   346	{
   347	    btokentype op = next_type(parser);
   348	    if (op >= OptAssign && op <= OptRsfAssign) {
   349	        return op;
   350	    }
   351	    return OP_NOT_ASSIGN;
   352	}
   353	
   354	/* Initialize bexpdesc structure with specific type and value as int */
   355	static void init_exp(bexpdesc *e, exptype_t type, bint i)
   356	{
   357	    e->type = (bbyte)type;
   358	    e->t = NO_JUMP;
   359	    e->f = NO_JUMP;
   360	    e->not = 0;
   361	    e->v.s = NULL;
   362	    e->v.i = i;
   363	}
   364	
   365	/* find local variable by name, starting at index `begin` */
   366	/* linear search, returns -1 if not found */
   367	static int find_localvar(bfuncinfo *finfo, bstring *s, int begin)
   368	{
   369	    int i, count = be_list_count(finfo->local);
   370	    bvalue *var = be_list_data(finfo->local);
   371	    for (i = count - 1; i >= begin; --i) {
   372	        if (be_eqstr(var[i].v.s, s)) {
   373	            return i;
   374	        }
   375	    }
   376	    return -1; /* not found */
   377	}
   378	
   379	/* create a new local variable by name, or return the current register if already exists */
   380	/* returns the Reg number for the variable */
   381	/* If STRICT, we don't allow a var to hide a var from outer scope */
   382	/* We don't allow the same var to be defined twice in same scope */
   383	static int new_localvar(bparser *parser, bstring *name)
   384	{
   385	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   386	    int reg = find_localvar(finfo, name, finfo->binfo->nactlocals); /* look if already exists skipping the local variables from upper blocks */
   387	    /* 'strict': raise an exception if the local variable shadows another local variable */
   388	    if (reg == -1) {
   389	        bvalue *var;
   390	        if (comp_is_strict(parser->vm)) {
   391	            if (find_localvar(finfo, name, 0) >= 0 && str(name)[0] != '.') {  /* we do accept nested redifinition of internal variables starting with ':' */
   392	                push_error(parser, "strict: redefinition of '%s' from outer scope", str(name));
   393	            }
   394	        }
   395	        reg = be_list_count(finfo->local); /* new local index */
   396	        var = be_list_push(parser->vm, finfo->local, NULL);
   397	        var_setstr(var, name);
   398	        if (reg >= finfo->freereg) {
   399	            be_code_allocregs(finfo, 1); /* use a register */
   400	        }
   401	        begin_varinfo(parser, name);
   402	    } else {
   403	        push_error(parser, "redefinition of '%s'", str(name));
   404	    }
   405	    return reg;
   406	}
   407	
   408	/* Find upval by name, if found return its index number, or -1 */
   409	static int find_upval(bfuncinfo *finfo, bstring *s)
   410	{
   411	    bvm *vm = finfo->lexer->vm;
   412	    bvalue *desc = be_map_findstr(vm, finfo->upval, s);
   413	    if (desc) {
   414	        return upval_index(desc->v.i);
   415	    }
   416	    return -1;
   417	}
   418	
   419	/* Recursively search for upper blocks that are referenced in upvals */
   420	/* and mark them with `hasupval` */
   421	static void mark_upval(bfuncinfo *finfo, int level)
   422	{
   423	    bblockinfo *binfo = finfo->prev->binfo;
   424	    while (binfo->nactlocals > level) {
   425	        binfo = binfo->prev;
   426	    }
   427	    binfo->hasupval = 1;
   428	}
   429	
   430	static int new_upval(bvm *vm, bfuncinfo *finfo, bstring *name, bexpdesc *var)
   431	{
   432	    int index;
   433	    bvalue *desc;
   434	    int target = var->v.idx;
   435	    int instack = var->type == ETLOCAL;
   436	    if (instack) { /* mark upvalue's block */
   437	        mark_upval(finfo, target);
   438	    }
   439	    index = be_map_count(finfo->upval);
   440	    if (index >= 255) {
   441	        be_lexerror(finfo->lexer, be_pushfstring(vm,
   442	            "too many upvalues (in '%s')", str(name)));
   443	    }
   444	    desc = be_map_insertstr(vm, finfo->upval, name, NULL);
   445	    var_setint(desc, upval_desc(index, target, instack));
   446	    return index;
   447	}
   448	
   449	/* create a new variable in currenr context as name, and create expdesc for it */
   450	/* If within a block, create as local, otherwise as global */
   451	static void new_var(bparser *parser, bstring *name, bexpdesc *var)
   452	{
   453	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   454	    if (finfo->prev || finfo->binfo->prev || parser->islocal) {
   455	        init_exp(var, ETLOCAL, 0);
   456	        var->v.idx = new_localvar(parser, name); /* if local, contains the index in current local var list */
   457	    } else {
   458	        init_exp(var, ETGLOBAL, 0);
   459	        var->v.idx = be_global_new(parser->vm, name);
   460	        if (var->v.idx > (int)IBx_MASK) {
   461	            push_error(parser,
   462	                "too many global variables (in '%s')", str(name));
   463	        }
   464	        if (comp_is_named_gbl(parser->vm)) {
   465	            /* change to ETNGLBAL */
   466	            bexpdesc key;
   467	            init_exp(&key, ETSTRING, 0);
   468	            key.v.s = name;
   469	            init_exp(var, ETNGLOBAL, 0);
   470	            var->v.idx = be_code_nglobal(parser->finfo, &key);
   471	        }
   472	    }
   473	}
   474	
   475	static int singlevaraux(bvm *vm, bfuncinfo *finfo, bstring *s, bexpdesc *var)
   476	{
   477	    if (finfo == NULL) {
   478	        return ETVOID;
   479	    } else {
   480	        int idx = find_localvar(finfo, s, 0);
   481	        if (idx >= 0) { /* local variable */
   482	            init_exp(var, ETLOCAL, 0);
   483	            var->v.idx = idx;
   484	            return ETLOCAL;
   485	        } else {
   486	            idx = find_upval(finfo, s);
   487	            if (idx < 0) {
   488	                /* find the previous scope  */
   489	                int res = singlevaraux(vm, finfo->prev, s, var);
   490	                if (res == ETUPVAL || res == ETLOCAL) {
   491	                    idx = new_upval(vm, finfo, s, var); /* new upvalue */
   492	                } else {
   493	                    idx = be_global_find(vm, s);
   494	                    if (idx >= 0) {
   495	                        if (idx < be_builtin_count(vm)) {
   496	                            return ETGLOBAL; /* global variable */
   497	                        } else {
   498	                            return comp_is_named_gbl(vm) ? ETNGLOBAL : ETGLOBAL; /* global variable */
   499	                        }
   500	                    } else {
   501	                        return ETVOID; /* unknow (new variable or error) */
   502	                    }
   503	                }
   504	            }
   505	            init_exp(var, ETUPVAL, idx);
   506	            return ETUPVAL;
   507	        }
   508	    }
   509	}
   510	
   511	/* get variable from next toden as name */
   512	/* and create an expdesc from it */
   513	/* can be new, global, named global, upval */
   514	static void singlevar(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *var)
   515	{
   516	    bexpdesc key;
   517	    bstring *varname = next_token(parser).u.s;
   518	    int type = singlevaraux(parser->vm, parser->finfo, varname, var);
   519	    switch (type) {
   520	    case ETVOID:
   521	        init_exp(var, ETVOID, 0);
   522	        var->v.s = varname;
   523	        break;
   524	    case ETGLOBAL:
   525	        init_exp(var, ETGLOBAL, 0);
   526	        var->v.idx = be_global_find(parser->vm, varname);
   527	        break;
   528	    case ETNGLOBAL:
   529	        init_exp(&key, ETSTRING, 0);
   530	        key.v.s = varname;
   531	        init_exp(var, ETNGLOBAL, 0);
   532	        var->v.idx = be_code_nglobal(parser->finfo, &key);
   533	        break;
   534	    default:
   535	        break;
   536	    }
   537	}
   538	
   539	/* parse a vararg argument in the form `def f(a, *b) end` */
   540	/* Munch the '*', read the token, create variable and declare the function as vararg */
   541	static void func_vararg(bparser *parser) {
   542	    bexpdesc v;
   543	    bstring *str;
   544	    match_token(parser, OptMul); /* skip '*' */
   545	    str = next_token(parser).u.s;
   546	    match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
   547	    new_var(parser, str, &v); /* new variable */
   548	    parser->finfo->proto->varg = 1;   /* set varg flag */
   549	}
   550	
   551	/* Parse function or method definition variable list */
   552	/* Create an implicit local variable for each argument starting at R0 */
   553	/* Update function proto argc to the expected number or arguments */
   554	/* Raise an exception if multiple arguments have the same name */
   555	/* New: vararg support */
   556	static void func_varlist(bparser *parser)
   557	{
   558	    bexpdesc v;
   559	    bstring *str;
   560	    /* '(' [ ID {',' ID}] ')' or */
   561	    /* '(' '*' ID ')' or */
   562	    /* '(' [ ID {',' ID}] ',' '*' ID ')' */
   563	    match_token(parser, OptLBK); /* skip '(' */
   564	    if (next_type(parser) == OptMul) {
   565	        func_vararg(parser);
   566	    } else if (match_id(parser, str) != NULL) {
   567	        new_var(parser, str, &v); /* new variable */
   568	        while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
   569	            if (next_type(parser) == OptMul) {
   570	                func_vararg(parser);
   571	                break;
   572	            } else {
   573	                str = next_token(parser).u.s;
   574	                match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
   575	                /* new local variable */
   576	                new_var(parser, str, &v);
   577	            }
   578	        }
   579	    }
   580	    match_token(parser, OptRBK); /* skip ')' */
   581	    parser->finfo->proto->argc = parser->finfo->freereg;
   582	}
   583	
   584	/* Parse a function includind arg list and body */
   585	/* Given name and type (function or method) */
   586	/* Returns `bproto` object */
   587	static bproto* funcbody(bparser *parser, bstring *name, int type)
   588	{
   589	    bfuncinfo finfo;
   590	    bblockinfo binfo;
   591	
   592	    /* '(' varlist ')' block 'end' */
   593	    begin_func(parser, &finfo, &binfo); /* init new function context */
   594	    finfo.proto->name = name;
   595	    if (type & FUNC_METHOD) { /* If method, add an implicit first argument `self` */
   596	        new_localvar(parser, parser_newstr(parser, "self"));
   597	    }
   598	    func_varlist(parser); /* parse arg list */
   599	    stmtlist(parser); /* parse statement without final `end` */
   600	    end_func(parser); /* close function context */
   601	    match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip 'end' */
   602	    return finfo.proto; /* return fully constructed `bproto` */
   603	}
   604	
   605	/* anonymous function, build `bproto` object with name `<anonymous>` */
   606	/* and build a expdesc for the bproto */
   607	static void anon_func(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   608	{
   609	    bproto *proto;
   610	    bstring *name = parser_newstr(parser, "<anonymous>");
   611	    /* 'def' ID '(' varlist ')' block 'end' */
   612	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'def' */
   613	    proto = funcbody(parser, name, FUNC_ANONYMOUS);
   614	    init_exp(e, ETPROTO, be_code_proto(parser->finfo, proto));
   615	    be_stackpop(parser->vm, 1);
   616	}
   617	
   618	static void lambda_varlist(bparser *parser)
   619	{
   620	    bexpdesc v;
   621	    bstring *str;
   622	    /* [ID {',' ID}] | {ID}] */
   623	    if (match_id(parser, str) != NULL) {
   624	        bbool comma;
   625	        new_var(parser, str, &v); /* new variable */
   626	        comma = next_type(parser) == OptComma;
   627	        while (next_type(parser) != OptArrow) {
   628	            if (comma) {
   629	                match_token(parser, OptComma); /* match and skip ',' */
   630	            }
   631	            str = next_token(parser).u.s;
   632	            match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
   633	            /* new local variable */
   634	            new_var(parser, str, &v);
   635	        }
   636	    }
   637	    match_token(parser, OptArrow); /* skip '->' */
   638	    parser->finfo->proto->argc = parser->finfo->freereg;
   639	}
   640	
   641	/* lambda expression */
   642	static void lambda_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   643	{
   644	    bexpdesc e1;
   645	    bfuncinfo finfo;
   646	    bblockinfo binfo;
   647	    bstring *name = parser_newstr(parser, "<lambda>");
   648	    /* '/' ID {[',' ID]} '->' expr */
   649	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '/' */
   650	    begin_func(parser, &finfo, &binfo);
   651	    finfo.proto->name = name;
   652	    lambda_varlist(parser);
   653	    expr(parser, &e1);
   654	    check_var(parser, &e1);
   655	    be_code_ret(parser->finfo, &e1);
   656	    end_func(parser);
   657	    init_exp(e, ETPROTO, be_code_proto(parser->finfo, finfo.proto));
   658	    be_stackpop(parser->vm, 1);
   659	}
   660	
   661	/* Instanciate a builtin type by name */
   662	/* Allocates a new register for the value, and call empty constructor */
   663	/* Is allocated as LOCAL and must be changed to REG when completed */
   664	static void new_primtype(bparser *parser, const char *type, bexpdesc *e)
   665	{
   666	    int idx;
   667	    bvm *vm = parser->vm;
   668	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   669	
   670	    scan_next_token(parser);
   671	    idx = be_builtin_find(vm, parser_newstr(parser, type));
   672	    init_exp(e, ETGLOBAL, idx);
   673	    idx = be_code_nextreg(finfo, e);
   674	    be_code_call(finfo, idx, 0);
   675	    e->type = ETLOCAL;  /* declare as local, will be changed to ETREG when completely initialized */
   676	}
   677	
   678	/* Parse next member within a list */
   679	/* `l` contains the current list. The expr is evaluated and added to the list */
   680	static void list_nextmember(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *l)
   681	{
   682	    bexpdesc e, v = *l;
   683	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   684	    expr(parser, &e); /* value */
   685	    check_var(parser, &e); /* check that we don´t have an unknown symbol */
   686	    be_code_binop(finfo, OptConnect, &v, &e, -1); /* add it to list with CONNECT */
   687	    be_code_freeregs(finfo, 1);  /* since left arg is LOCAL, an ETREG was allocated. Free it */
   688	}
   689	
   690	static void map_nextmember(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *l)
   691	{
   692	    bexpdesc e, v = *l;
   693	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   694	    expr(parser, &e); /* key */
   695	    check_var(parser, &e);  /* check if value is valid */
   696	    be_code_index(finfo, &v, &e);  /* package as `v` as INDEX suffix for value `e` */
   697	    match_token(parser, OptColon); /* ':' */
   698	    expr(parser, &e); /* value in `e` */
   699	    check_var(parser, &e);  /* check if value is correct */
   700	    be_code_setvar(finfo, &v, &e);  /* set suffi  INDEX value to e */
   701	}
   702	
   703	static void list_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   704	{
   705	    /* '[' {expr ','} [expr] ']' */
   706	    new_primtype(parser, "list", e); /* new list, created as LOCAL first */
   707	    while (next_type(parser) != OptRSB) {
   708	        list_nextmember(parser, e);
   709	        if (!match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
   710	            break;
   711	        }
   712	    }
   713	    e->type = ETREG; /* then turned to REG */
   714	    match_token(parser, OptRSB); /* skip ']' */
   715	}
   716	
   717	static void map_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   718	{
   719	    /* '{' {expr ':' expr ','} [expr ':' expr] '}' */
   720	    new_primtype(parser, "map", e); /* new map */
   721	    while (next_type(parser) != OptRBR) {
   722	        map_nextmember(parser, e);
   723	        if (!match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
   724	            break;
   725	        }
   726	    }
   727	    e->type = ETREG;
   728	    match_token(parser, OptRBR); /* skip '}' */
   729	}
   730	
   731	/* push each argument as new reg and return number of args */
   732	/* TODO `e` is ignored by caller */
   733	static int exprlist(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   734	{
   735	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   736	    int n = 1;
   737	    /* expr { ',' expr } */
   738	    expr(parser, e);  /* parse expr */
   739	    check_var(parser, e);  /* check if valid */
   740	    be_code_nextreg(finfo, e);  /* move result to next reg */
   741	    while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
   742	        expr(parser, e);
   743	        check_var(parser, e);
   744	        be_code_nextreg(finfo, e);
   745	        ++n;
   746	    }
   747	    return n;
   748	}
   749	
   750	/* parse call to method or function */
   751	/* `e` can be a member (method) or a register */
   752	/* On return, `e` is ETREG to the result of the call */
   753	static void call_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   754	{
   755	    bexpdesc args;
   756	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   757	    int argc = 0, base;
   758	    int ismember = e->type == ETMEMBER;
   759	
   760	    /* func '(' [exprlist] ')' */
   761	    check_var(parser, e);
   762	    /* code function index to next register */
   763	    if (ismember) {
   764	        base = be_code_getmethod(finfo, e);
   765	    } else {
   766	        base = be_code_nextreg(finfo, e); /* allocate a new base reg if not at top already */
   767	    }
   768	    /* base is always taken at top of freereg and allocates 1 reg for function and 2 regs for method */
   769	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '(' */
   770	    if (next_type(parser) != OptRBK) {  /* if arg list is not empty */
   771	        argc = exprlist(parser, &args);  /* push each argument as new reg and return number of args */
   772	    }
   773	    match_token(parser, OptRBK); /* skip ')' */
   774	    argc += ismember;   /* if method there is an additional implicit arg */
   775	    be_code_call(finfo, base, argc);
   776	    if (e->type != ETREG) {
   777	        e->type = ETREG;
   778	        e->v.idx = base;
   779	    }
   780	}
   781	
   782	/* Parse member expression */
   783	/* Generates an ETMEMBER object that is materialized later into GETMBR, GETMET or SETMBR */
   784	static void member_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   785	{
   786	    bstring *str;
   787	    /* . ID */
   788	    check_var(parser, e);
   789	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '.' */
   790	    if (match_id(parser, str) != NULL) {
   791	        bexpdesc key;
   792	        init_exp(&key, ETSTRING, 0);
   793	        key.v.s = str;
   794	        be_code_member(parser->finfo, e, &key);
   795	    } else if (next_type(parser) == OptLBK) {
   796	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '(' */
   797	        bexpdesc key;
   798	        expr(parser, &key);
   799	        check_var(parser, &key);
   800	        match_token(parser, OptRBK); /* skip ')' */
   801	        be_code_member(parser->finfo, e, &key);
   802	    } else {
   803	        push_error(parser, "invalid syntax near '%s'",
   804	            be_token2str(parser->vm, &next_token(parser)));
   805	    }
   806	}
   807	
   808	static void index_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   809	{
   810	    bexpdesc e1;
   811	    /* [expr] */
   812	    check_var(parser, e);
   813	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '[' */
   814	    expr(parser, &e1);
   815	    check_var(parser, &e1);
   816	    be_code_index(parser->finfo, e, &e1);
   817	    match_token(parser, OptRSB); /* skip ']' */
   818	}
   819	
   820	static void simple_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   821	{
   822	    switch (next_type(parser)) {
   823	    case TokenInteger:
   824	        init_exp(e, ETINT, next_token(parser).u.i);
   825	        break;
   826	    case TokenReal:
   827	        init_exp(e, ETREAL, 0);
   828	        e->v.r = next_token(parser).u.r;
   829	        break;
   830	    case TokenString:
   831	        init_exp(e, ETSTRING, 0);
   832	        e->v.s = next_token(parser).u.s;
   833	        break;
   834	    case TokenId:
   835	        singlevar(parser, e);
   836	        break;
   837	    case KeyTrue:
   838	        init_exp(e, ETBOOL, 1);
   839	        break;
   840	    case KeyFalse:
   841	        init_exp(e, ETBOOL, 0);
   842	        break;
   843	    case KeyNil:
   844	        init_exp(e, ETNIL, 0);
   845	        break;
   846	    default: /* unknow expr */
   847	        return;
   848	    }
   849	    scan_next_token(parser);
   850	}
   851	
   852	static void primary_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   853	{
   854	    switch (next_type(parser)) {
   855	    case OptLBK: /* '(' expr ')' */
   856	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '(' */
   857	        /* sub_expr() is more efficient because there is no need to initialize e. */
   858	        sub_expr(parser, e, ASSIGN_OP_PRIO);
   859	        check_var(parser, e);
   860	        match_token(parser, OptRBK); /* skip ')' */
   861	        break;
   862	    case OptLSB: /* list */
   863	        list_expr(parser, e);
   864	        break;
   865	    case OptLBR: /* map */
   866	        map_expr(parser, e);
   867	        break;
   868	    case KeyDef: /* anonymous function */
   869	        anon_func(parser, e);
   870	        break;
   871	    case OptDiv: /* lambda expression */
   872	        lambda_expr(parser, e);
   873	        break;
   874	    default: /* simple expr */
   875	        simple_expr(parser, e);
   876	        break;
   877	    }
   878	}
   879	
   880	static void suffix_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   881	{
   882	    primary_expr(parser, e);
   883	    for (;;) {
   884	        switch (next_type(parser)) {
   885	        case OptLBK: /* '(' function call */
   886	            call_expr(parser, e);
   887	            break;
   888	        case OptDot: /* '.' member */
   889	            member_expr(parser, e);
   890	            break;
   891	        case OptLSB: /* '[' index */
   892	            index_expr(parser, e);
   893	            break;
   894	        default:
   895	            return;
   896	        }
   897	    }
   898	}
   899	
   900	static void suffix_alloc_reg(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *l)
   901	{
   902	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   903	    bbool is_suffix = l->type == ETINDEX || l->type == ETMEMBER;   /* is suffix */
   904	    bbool is_suffix_reg = l->v.ss.tt == ETREG || l->v.ss.tt == ETLOCAL || l->v.ss.tt == ETGLOBAL || l->v.ss.tt == ETNGLOBAL;   /* if suffix, does it need a register */
   905	    bbool is_global = l->type == ETGLOBAL || l->type == ETNGLOBAL;
   906	    /* in the suffix expression, if the object is a temporary
   907	     * variable (l->v.ss.tt == ETREG), it needs to be cached. */
   908	    if (is_global || (is_suffix && is_suffix_reg)) {
   909	        be_code_allocregs(finfo, 1);
   910	    }
   911	}
   912	
   913	/* compound assignment */
   914	static void compound_assign(bparser *parser, int op, bexpdesc *l, bexpdesc *r)
   915	{
   916	    int dst = -1;  /* destination register in case of compound assignment */
   917	    if (op != OptAssign) { /* check left variable */
   918	        check_var(parser, l);
   919	        /* cache the register of the object when continuously assigning */
   920	        dst = parser->finfo->freereg;
   921	        suffix_alloc_reg(parser, l);
   922	    }
   923	    expr(parser, r); /* right expression */
   924	    check_var(parser, r);
   925	    if (op != OptAssign) { /* compound assignment */
   926	        bexpdesc e = *l;
   927	        op = op < OptAndAssign ? op - OptAddAssign + OptAdd
   928	                : op - OptAndAssign + OptBitAnd;
   929	        be_code_binop(parser->finfo, op, &e, r, dst); /* coding operation */
   930	        *r = e;
   931	    }
   932	}
   933	
   934	/* check if we need to create a new local variable with this name to be assigned to */
   935	/* Returns true if it´s a new local variable */
   936	/* A new implicit local variable is created if no global has the same name (excluding builtins) */
   937	/* This means that you can override a builtin silently */
   938	/* This also means that a function cannot create a global, they must preexist or create with `global` module */
   939	/* TODO add warning in strict mode */
   940	static int check_newvar(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   941	{
   942	    if (e->type == ETGLOBAL) {
   943	        if (e->v.idx < be_builtin_count(parser->vm)) {
   944	            e->v.s = be_builtin_name(parser->vm, e->v.idx);
   945	            if (comp_is_strict(parser->vm)) {
   946	                push_error(parser, "strict: redefinition of builtin '%s'",
   947	                    str(e->v.s));
   948	            }
   949	            return btrue;
   950	        }
   951	        return bfalse;
   952	    }
   953	    if (comp_is_strict(parser->vm)) {
   954	        bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   955	        if ((e->type == ETVOID) && (finfo->prev || finfo->binfo->prev || parser->islocal)) {
   956	            push_error(parser, "strict: no global '%s', did you mean 'var %s'?",
   957	                str(e->v.s), str(e->v.s));
   958	        }
   959	    }
   960	    return e->type == ETVOID;
   961	}
   962	
   963	static void assign_expr(bparser *parser)
   964	{
   965	    bexpdesc e;
   966	    btokentype op;
   967	    int line = parser->lexer.linenumber;
   968	    expr(parser, &e); /* left expression */
   969	    check_symbol(parser, &e);
   970	    op = get_assign_op(parser);
   971	    if (op != OP_NOT_ASSIGN) { /* assign operator */
   972	        bexpdesc e1;
   973	        scan_next_token(parser);
   974	        compound_assign(parser, op, &e, &e1);
   975	        if (check_newvar(parser, &e)) { /* new variable */
   976	            new_var(parser, e.v.s, &e);
   977	        }
   978	        if (be_code_setvar(parser->finfo, &e, &e1)) {
   979	            parser->lexer.linenumber = line;
   980	            parser_error(parser,
   981	                "try to assign constant expressions.");
   982	        }
   983	    } else if (e.type >= ETMEMBER) {
   984	        bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   985	        /* these expressions occupy a register and need to be freed */
   986	        finfo->freereg = (bbyte)be_list_count(finfo->local);
   987	    } else if (e.type == ETVOID) { /* not assign expression */
   988	        /* undeclared symbol */
   989	        parser->lexer.linenumber = line;
   990	        check_var(parser, &e);
   991	    } 
   992	}
   993	
   994	/* conditional expression */
   995	static void cond_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   996	{
   997	    /* expr '?' expr ':' expr */
   998	    if (next_type(parser) == OptQuestion) {
   999	        int jf, jl = NO_JUMP; /* jump list */
  1000	        bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1001	        check_var(parser, e);  /* check if valid */
  1002	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '?' */
  1003	        be_code_jumpbool(finfo, e, bfalse); /* go if true */
  1004	        jf = e->f;
  1005	        expr(parser, e);
  1006	        check_var(parser, e);
  1007	        be_code_nextreg(finfo, e);
  1008	        be_code_freeregs(finfo, 1);
  1009	        be_code_conjump(finfo, &jl, be_code_jump(finfo)); /* connect jump */
  1010	        be_code_patchjump(finfo, jf);
  1011	        match_token(parser, OptColon); /* match and skip ':' */
  1012	        expr(parser, e);
  1013	        check_var(parser, e);
  1014	        e->v.idx = be_code_nextreg(finfo, e);
  1015	        be_code_patchjump(finfo, jl);
  1016	        e->type = ETREG;
  1017	    }
  1018	}
  1019	
  1020	/* binary operator: + - * / % && || < <= == != > >=
  1021	 * unary operator: + - !
  1022	 */
  1023	static void sub_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e, int prio)
  1024	{
  1025	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1026	    btokentype op = get_unary_op(parser);  /* check if first token in unary op */
  1027	    if (op != OP_NOT_UNARY) {  /* unary op found */
  1028	        int line, res;
  1029	        scan_next_token(parser);  /* move to next token */
  1030	        line = parser->lexer.linenumber;  /* remember line number for error reporting */
  1031	        sub_expr(parser, e, UNARY_OP_PRIO);  /* parse subexpr with new prio */
  1032	        check_var(parser, e);  /* check that the value is ok */
  1033	        res = be_code_unop(finfo, op, e);  /* apply unary op with optimizations if the token is a value */
  1034	        if (res) { /* encode unary op */
  1035	            parser->lexer.linenumber = line;
  1036	            push_error(parser, "wrong type argument to unary '%s'",
  1037	                res == 1 ? "negative" : "bit-flip");
  1038	        }
  1039	    } else {
  1040	        suffix_expr(parser, e);  /* parse left part of binop */
  1041	    }
  1042	    op = get_binop(parser);  /* check if binop */
  1043	    while (op != OP_NOT_BINARY && prio > binary_op_prio(op)) {  /* is binop applicable */
  1044	        bexpdesc e2;
  1045	        check_var(parser, e);  /* check that left part is valid */
  1046	        scan_next_token(parser);  /* move to next token */
  1047	        be_code_prebinop(finfo, op, e); /* and or */
  1048	        init_exp(&e2, ETVOID, 0);
  1049	        sub_expr(parser, &e2, binary_op_prio(op));  /* parse right side */
  1050	        check_var(parser, &e2);  /* check if valid */
  1051	        be_code_binop(finfo, op, e, &e2, -1); /* encode binary op */
  1052	        op = get_binop(parser);  /* is there a following binop? */
  1053	    }
  1054	    if (prio == ASSIGN_OP_PRIO) {
  1055	        cond_expr(parser, e);
  1056	    }
  1057	}
  1058	
  1059	/* Parse new expression and return value in `e` (overwritten) */
  1060	/* Initializes an empty expdes  and parse subexpr */
  1061	/* Always allocates a new temp register at top of freereg */
  1062	static void expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
  1063	{
  1064	    init_exp(e, ETVOID, 0);
  1065	    sub_expr(parser, e, ASSIGN_OP_PRIO);
  1066	}
  1067	
  1068	static void expr_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1069	{
  1070	    assign_expr(parser);
  1071	}
  1072	
  1073	static int block_follow(bparser *parser)
  1074	{
  1075	    switch (next_type(parser)) {
  1076	    case KeyElse: case KeyElif:
  1077	    case KeyEnd: case KeyExcept:
  1078	    case TokenEOS:
  1079	        return 0;
  1080	    default:
  1081	        return 1;
  1082	    }
  1083	}
  1084	
  1085	static int cond_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1086	{
  1087	    bexpdesc e;
  1088	    /* expr */
  1089	    match_notoken(parser, OptRBK);
  1090	    expr(parser, &e);
  1091	    check_var(parser, &e);
  1092	    be_code_jumpbool(parser->finfo, &e, bfalse); /* go if true */
  1093	    return e.f;
  1094	}
  1095	
  1096	static void condition_block(bparser *parser, int *jmp)
  1097	{
  1098	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1099	    int br = cond_stmt(parser);
  1100	    block(parser, 0);
  1101	    if (next_type(parser) == KeyElif
  1102	            || next_type(parser) == KeyElse) {
  1103	        be_code_conjump(finfo, jmp, be_code_jump(finfo)); /* connect jump */
  1104	    }
  1105	    be_code_patchjump(finfo, br);
  1106	}
  1107	
  1108	static void if_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1109	{
  1110	    int jl = NO_JUMP; /* jump list */
  1111	    /* IF expr block {ELSEIF expr block}, [ELSE block], end */
  1112	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'if' */
  1113	    condition_block(parser, &jl);
  1114	    while (match_skip(parser, KeyElif)) { /* 'elif' */
  1115	        condition_block(parser, &jl);
  1116	    }
  1117	    if (match_skip(parser, KeyElse)) { /* 'else' */
  1118	        block(parser, 0);
  1119	    }
  1120	    match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip end */
  1121	    be_code_patchjump(parser->finfo, jl);
  1122	}
  1123	
  1124	static void do_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1125	{
  1126	    /* DO block END */
  1127	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'do' */
  1128	    block(parser, 0);
  1129	    match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip 'end' */
  1130	}
  1131	
  1132	static void while_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1133	{
  1134	    int brk;
  1135	    bblockinfo binfo;
  1136	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1137	    /* WHILE expr block END */
  1138	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'while' */
  1139	    begin_block(parser->finfo, &binfo, BLOCK_LOOP);
  1140	    brk = cond_stmt(parser);
  1141	    stmtlist(parser);
  1142	    end_block(parser);
  1143	    be_code_patchjump(finfo, brk);
  1144	    match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip 'end' */
  1145	}
  1146	
  1147	static bstring* for_itvar(bparser *parser)
  1148	{
  1149	    bstring *str;
  1150	    if (match_id(parser, str) == NULL) {
  1151	        push_error(parser,
  1152	            "missing iteration variable before '%s'",
  1153	            token2str(parser));
  1154	    }
  1155	    return str;
  1156	}
  1157	
  1158	static void for_init(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *v)
  1159	{
  1160	    bexpdesc e;
  1161	    bstring *s;
  1162	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1163	    /* .it = __iterator__(expr) */
  1164	    s = parser_newstr(parser, "__iterator__");
  1165	    init_exp(&e, ETGLOBAL, be_builtin_find(parser->vm, s));
  1166	    be_code_nextreg(finfo, &e); /* code function '__iterator__' */
  1167	    expr(parser, v);
  1168	    check_var(parser, v);
  1169	    be_code_nextreg(finfo, v);
  1170	    be_code_call(finfo, e.v.idx, 1); /* call __iterator__(expr) */
  1171	    be_code_freeregs(finfo, 1); /* free register of __iterator__ */
  1172	    s = parser_newstr(parser, ".it");
  1173	    init_exp(v, ETLOCAL, new_localvar(parser, s));
  1174	}
  1175	
  1176	static void for_iter(bparser *parser, bstring *var, bexpdesc *it)
  1177	{
  1178	    bexpdesc e;
  1179	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1180	    /* reset the jump head PC of the for loop body */
  1181	    finfo->binfo->beginpc = finfo->pc;
  1182	    /* itvar = .it() */
  1183	    init_exp(&e, ETLOCAL, new_localvar(parser, var)); /* new itvar */
  1184	    be_code_setvar(finfo, &e, it); /* code function to variable '.it' */
  1185	    be_code_call(finfo, e.v.idx, 0); /* itvar <- call .it() */
  1186	    stmtlist(parser);
  1187	}
  1188	
  1189	static void for_leave(bparser *parser, int jcatch, int beginpc)
  1190	{
  1191	    bexpdesc e;
  1192	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1193	    int jbrk = finfo->binfo->breaklist;
  1194	    init_exp(&e, ETSTRING, 0);
  1195	    e.v.s = parser_newstr(parser, "stop_iteration");
  1196	    end_block_ex(parser, beginpc); /* leave except & loop block */
  1197	    if (jbrk != NO_JUMP) { /* has `break` statement in iteration block */
  1198	        be_code_exblk(finfo, 1);
  1199	        jbrk = be_code_jump(finfo);
  1200	    }
  1201	    be_code_conjump(finfo, &jcatch, finfo->pc);
  1202	    be_code_catch(finfo, be_code_nextreg(finfo, &e), 1, 0, NULL);
  1203	    be_code_raise(finfo, NULL, NULL);
  1204	    be_code_conjump(finfo, &jbrk, finfo->pc);
  1205	    be_code_freeregs(finfo, 1);
  1206	}
  1207	
  1208	/* approximate equivalent script code:
  1209	 * .it = __iter__(expr)
  1210	 * try
  1211	 *     while (1)
  1212	 *         itvar = .it()
  1213	 *         stmtlist
  1214	 *     end
  1215	 * except ('stop_iteration')
  1216	 * end
  1217	 * */
  1218	static void for_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1219	{
  1220	    bstring *var;
  1221	    bexpdesc iter;
  1222	    bblockinfo binfo;
  1223	    int jcatch, beginpc = parser->finfo->pc;
  1224	    /* FOR ID : expr block END */
  1225	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'for' */
  1226	    begin_block(parser->finfo, &binfo, BLOCK_EXCEPT | BLOCK_LOOP);
  1227	    var = for_itvar(parser);
  1228	    match_token(parser, OptColon); /* skip ':' */
  1229	    for_init(parser, &iter);
  1230	    jcatch = be_code_exblk(parser->finfo, 0);
  1231	    for_iter(parser, var, &iter);
  1232	    for_leave(parser, jcatch, beginpc);
  1233	    match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip 'end' */
  1234	}
  1235	
  1236	static bblockinfo* break_block(bparser *parser)
  1237	{
  1238	    int try_depth = 0; /* count of exception catch blocks */
  1239	    bblockinfo *binfo = parser->finfo->binfo;
  1240	    /* BREAK | CONTINUE */
  1241	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'break' or 'continue' */
  1242	    while (binfo && !(binfo->type & BLOCK_LOOP)) {
  1243	        if (binfo->type & BLOCK_EXCEPT) {
  1244	            ++try_depth; /* leave the exception catch block */
  1245	        }
  1246	        binfo = binfo->prev;
  1247	    }
  1248	    if (binfo && try_depth) { /* exception catch blocks that needs to leave */
  1249	        be_code_exblk(parser->finfo, try_depth);
  1250	    }
  1251	    return binfo;
  1252	}
  1253	
  1254	static void break_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1255	{
  1256	    bfuncinfo *f = parser->finfo;
  1257	    bblockinfo *binfo = break_block(parser);
  1258	    if (binfo != NULL) { /* connect jump */
  1259	        be_code_conjump(f, &binfo->breaklist, be_code_jump(f));
  1260	    } else {
  1261	        parser_error(parser, "break not loop");
  1262	    }
  1263	}
  1264	
  1265	static void continue_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1266	{
  1267	    bfuncinfo *f = parser->finfo;
  1268	    bblockinfo *b = break_block(parser);
  1269	    if (b != NULL) { /* connect jump */
  1270	        be_code_conjump(f, &b->continuelist, be_code_jump(f));
  1271	    } else {
  1272	        parser_error(parser, "continue not loop");
  1273	    }
  1274	}
  1275	
  1276	static bbool isoverloadable(btokentype type)
  1277	{
  1278	    return (type >= OptAdd && type <= OptConnect) /* overloaded binary operator */
  1279	        || type == OptFlip || type == OptLBK;     /* '~' and '()' operator */
  1280	}
  1281	
  1282	static bstring* func_name(bparser* parser, bexpdesc* e, int ismethod)
  1283	{
  1284	    btokentype type = next_type(parser);
  1285	    if (type == TokenId) {
  1286	        bstring *name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1287	        if (!ismethod) {
  1288	            new_var(parser, name, e); /* new variable */
  1289	        }
  1290	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip name */
  1291	        return name;
  1292	    } else if (ismethod && isoverloadable(type)) {
  1293	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip token */
  1294	        /* '-*' negative operator */
  1295	        if (type == OptSub && next_type(parser) == OptMul) {
  1296	            scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '*' */
  1297	            return parser_newstr(parser, "-*");
  1298	        }
  1299	        /* '()' call operator */
  1300	        if (type == OptLBK && next_type(parser) == OptRBK) {
  1301	            scan_next_token(parser); /* skip ')' */
  1302	            return parser_newstr(parser, "()");
  1303	        }
  1304	        return parser_newstr(parser, be_tokentype2str(type));
  1305	    }
  1306	    push_error(parser,
  1307	        "the token '%s' is not a valid function name.",
  1308	        token2str(parser));
  1309	    return NULL;
  1310	}
  1311	
  1312	static void def_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1313	{
  1314	    bexpdesc e;
  1315	    bproto *proto;
  1316	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1317	    /* 'def' ID '(' varlist ')' block 'end' */
  1318	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'def' */
  1319	    proto = funcbody(parser, func_name(parser, &e, 0), 0);
  1320	    be_code_closure(finfo, &e, be_code_proto(finfo, proto));
  1321	    be_stackpop(parser->vm, 1);
  1322	}
  1323	
  1324	static void return_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1325	{
  1326	    bexpdesc e;
  1327	    /* 'return' expr */
  1328	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'return' */
  1329	    expr(parser, &e);
  1330	    if (e.v.s) { /* expression is not empty */
  1331	        check_var(parser, &e);
  1332	    }
  1333	    be_code_ret(parser->finfo, &e);
  1334	}
  1335	
  1336	static void check_class_attr(bparser *parser, bclass *c, bstring *attr)
  1337	{
  1338	    if (be_class_attribute(parser->vm, c, attr) != BE_NONE) {
  1339	        push_error(parser,
  1340	            "redefinition of the attribute '%s'", str(attr));
  1341	    }
  1342	}
  1343	
  1344	static void classvar_stmt(bparser *parser, bclass *c)
  1345	{
  1346	    bstring *name;
  1347	    /* 'var' ID {',' ID} */
  1348	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'var' */
  1349	    if (match_id(parser, name) != NULL) {
  1350	        check_class_attr(parser, c, name);
  1351	        be_member_bind(parser->vm, c, name, btrue);
  1352	        while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
  1353	            if (match_id(parser, name) != NULL) {
  1354	                check_class_attr(parser, c, name);
  1355	                be_member_bind(parser->vm, c, name, btrue);
  1356	            } else {
  1357	                parser_error(parser, "class var error");
  1358	            }
  1359	        }
  1360	    } else {
  1361	        parser_error(parser, "class var error");
  1362	    }
  1363	}
  1364	
  1365	static void class_static_assignment_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e, bstring *name)
  1366	{
  1367	    if (match_skip(parser, OptAssign)) { /* '=' */
  1368	        bexpdesc e1, e2;
  1369	        /* parse the right expression */
  1370	        expr(parser, &e2);
  1371	
  1372	        e1 = *e;        /* copy the class description */
  1373	        bexpdesc key;   /* build the member key */
  1374	        init_exp(&key, ETSTRING, 0);
  1375	        key.v.s = name;
  1376	
  1377	        be_code_member(parser->finfo, &e1, &key);   /* compute member accessor */
  1378	        be_code_setvar(parser->finfo, &e1, &e2);    /* set member */
  1379	    }
  1380	}
  1381	
  1382	static void classstatic_stmt(bparser *parser, bclass *c, bexpdesc *e)
  1383	{
  1384	    bstring *name;
  1385	    /* 'static' ID ['=' expr] {',' ID ['=' expr] } */
  1386	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'static' */
  1387	    if (match_id(parser, name) != NULL) {
  1388	        check_class_attr(parser, c, name);
  1389	        be_member_bind(parser->vm, c, name, bfalse);
  1390	        class_static_assignment_expr(parser, e, name);
  1391	
  1392	        while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
  1393	            if (match_id(parser, name) != NULL) {
  1394	                check_class_attr(parser, c, name);
  1395	                be_member_bind(parser->vm, c, name, bfalse);
  1396	                class_static_assignment_expr(parser, e, name);
  1397	            } else {
  1398	                parser_error(parser, "class static error");
  1399	            }
  1400	        }
  1401	    } else {
  1402	        parser_error(parser, "class static error");
  1403	    }
  1404	}
  1405	
  1406	static void classdef_stmt(bparser *parser, bclass *c)
  1407	{
  1408	    bexpdesc e;
  1409	    bstring *name;
  1410	    bproto *proto;
  1411	    /* 'def' ID '(' varlist ')' block 'end' */
  1412	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'def' */
  1413	    name = func_name(parser, &e, 1);
  1414	    check_class_attr(parser, c, name);
  1415	    proto = funcbody(parser, name, FUNC_METHOD);
  1416	    be_method_bind(parser->vm, c, proto->name, proto);
  1417	    be_stackpop(parser->vm, 1);
  1418	}
  1419	
  1420	static void class_inherit(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
  1421	{
  1422	    if (next_type(parser) == OptColon) { /* ':' */
  1423	        bexpdesc ec = *e;    /* work on a copy because we preserve original class */
  1424	        bexpdesc e1;
  1425	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip ':' */
  1426	        expr(parser, &e1);
  1427	        check_var(parser, &e1);
  1428	        be_code_setsuper(parser->finfo, &ec, &e1);
  1429	    }
  1430	}
  1431	
  1432	static void class_block(bparser *parser, bclass *c, bexpdesc *e)
  1433	{
  1434	    /* { [;] } */
  1435	    while (block_follow(parser)) {
  1436	        switch (next_type(parser)) {
  1437	        case KeyVar: classvar_stmt(parser, c); break;
  1438	        case KeyStatic: classstatic_stmt(parser, c, e); break;
  1439	        case KeyDef: classdef_stmt(parser, c); break;
  1440	        case OptSemic: scan_next_token(parser); break;
  1441	        default: push_error(parser,
  1442	                "unexpected token '%s'", token2str(parser));
  1443	        }
  1444	    }
  1445	}
  1446	
  1447	static void class_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1448	{
  1449	    bstring *name;
  1450	    /* 'class' ID [':' ID] class_block 'end' */
  1451	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'class' */
  1452	    if (match_id(parser, name) != NULL) {
  1453	        bexpdesc e;
  1454	        bclass *c = be_newclass(parser->vm, name, NULL);
  1455	        new_var(parser, name, &e);
  1456	        be_code_class(parser->finfo, &e, c);
  1457	        class_inherit(parser, &e);
  1458	        class_block(parser, c, &e);
  1459	        be_class_compress(parser->vm, c); /* compress class size */
  1460	        match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip 'end' */
  1461	    } else {
  1462	        parser_error(parser, "class name error");
  1463	    }
  1464	}
  1465	
  1466	static void import_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1467	{
  1468	    bstring *name; /* variable name */
  1469	    bexpdesc m, v;
  1470	    /* 'import' (ID (['as' ID] | {',' ID}) | STRING 'as' ID ) */
  1471	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'import' */
  1472	    init_exp(&m, ETSTRING, 0);
  1473	    m.v.s = name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1474	    if (next_type(parser) == TokenString) { /* STRING 'as' ID */
  1475	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip the module path */
  1476	        match_token(parser, KeyAs); /* match and skip 'as' */
  1477	        name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1478	        match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1479	    } else { /* ID (['as' ID] | {',' ID}) */
  1480	        match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1481	        if (match_skip(parser, KeyAs)) { /* 'as' */
  1482	            name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1483	            match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1484	        } else { /* {',' ID} */
  1485	            while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
  1486	                new_var(parser, name, &v);
  1487	                be_code_import(parser->finfo, &m, &v); /* code import */
  1488	                init_exp(&m, ETSTRING, 0); /* scanning for next node */
  1489	                m.v.s = name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1490	                match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1491	            }
  1492	        }
  1493	    }
  1494	    new_var(parser, name, &v);
  1495	    be_code_import(parser->finfo, &m, &v);
  1496	}
  1497	
  1498	static void var_field(bparser *parser)
  1499	{
  1500	    /* ID ['=' expr] */
  1501	    bexpdesc e1, e2;
  1502	    bstring *name;
  1503	    name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1504	    match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1505	    if (match_skip(parser, OptAssign)) { /* '=' */
  1506	        expr(parser, &e2);
  1507	        check_var(parser, &e2);
  1508	    } else {
  1509	        init_exp(&e2, ETNIL, 0);
  1510	    }
  1511	    new_var(parser, name, &e1); /* new variable */
  1512	    be_code_setvar(parser->finfo, &e1, &e2);
  1513	}
  1514	
  1515	static void var_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1516	{
  1517	    /* 'var' ID ['=' expr] {',' ID ['=' expr]} */
  1518	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'var' */
  1519	    var_field(parser);
  1520	    while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
  1521	        var_field(parser);
  1522	    }
  1523	}
  1524	
  1525	static int except_case_list(bparser *parser, int *base)
  1526	{
  1527	    int idx;
  1528	    bexpdesc e;
  1529	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1530	    /* expr {',' expr} | '..' */
  1531	    if (match_skip(parser, OptConnect)) { /* '..' */
  1532	        *base = finfo->freereg;
  1533	        return 0;
  1534	    }
  1535	    expr(parser, &e); /* first exception expression */
  1536	    check_var(parser, &e);
  1537	    *base = idx = be_code_nextreg(finfo, &e);
  1538	    while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
  1539	        expr(parser, &e);
  1540	        check_var(parser, &e);
  1541	        idx = be_code_nextreg(finfo, &e);
  1542	    }
  1543	    idx = idx - *base + 1; /* count of exception expression */
  1544	    be_code_freeregs(finfo, idx);
  1545	    return idx;
  1546	}
  1547	
  1548	static int except_var_list(bparser *parser, int base)
  1549	{
  1550	    bexpdesc v;
  1551	    (void)base; /* unused variable (no debugging) */
  1552	    /* [as ID [, ID]] */
  1553	    if (match_skip(parser, KeyAs)) { /* 'as' */
  1554	        bstring *name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1555	        match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1556	        new_var(parser, name, &v); /* new local variable */
  1557	        be_assert(v.type == ETLOCAL && v.v.idx == base);
  1558	        if (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* match and skip ',' */
  1559	            name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1560	            match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1561	            new_var(parser, name, &v); /* new local variable */
  1562	            be_assert(v.type == ETLOCAL && v.v.idx == base + 1);
  1563	            return 2;
  1564	        }
  1565	        return 1;
  1566	    }
  1567	    return 0;
  1568	}
  1569	
  1570	static void except_block(bparser *parser, int *jmp, int *jbrk)
  1571	{
  1572	    int base = 0; /* the first register of the catch opcode */
  1573	    int ecnt = 0; /* exception cases count */
  1574	    int vcnt = 0; /* exception variable count */
  1575	    bblockinfo binfo;
  1576	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1577	    /* 'except' (expr {',' expr} | '..') ['as' ID [',' ID]] */
  1578	    match_token(parser, KeyExcept); /* skip 'except' */
  1579	    begin_block(finfo, &binfo, 0); /* begin catch block */
  1580	    /* link from the previous except failure point */
  1581	    be_code_conjump(finfo, jmp, finfo->pc);
  1582	    /* (expr {',' expr} | '..') ['as' ID [',' ID]] */
  1583	    ecnt = except_case_list(parser, &base);
  1584	    vcnt = except_var_list(parser, base);
  1585	    be_code_catch(finfo, base, ecnt, vcnt, jmp);
  1586	    stmtlist(parser);
  1587	    be_code_conjump(finfo, jbrk, be_code_jump(finfo));
  1588	    end_block(parser); /* leave catch block */
  1589	}
  1590	
  1591	static void try_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1592	{
  1593	    int jcatch, jbrk;
  1594	    /* 'try' block 'except' except_stmt block 'end' */
  1595	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'try' */
  1596	    jcatch = be_code_exblk(parser->finfo, 0);
  1597	    block(parser, BLOCK_EXCEPT);
  1598	    be_code_exblk(parser->finfo, 1);
  1599	    jbrk = be_code_jump(parser->finfo);
  1600	    except_block(parser, &jcatch, &jbrk);
  1601	    while (next_type(parser) == KeyExcept) {
  1602	        except_block(parser, &jcatch, &jbrk);
  1603	    }
  1604	    be_code_patchjump(parser->finfo, jcatch);
  1605	    be_code_raise(parser->finfo, NULL, NULL);
  1606	    be_code_patchjump(parser->finfo, jbrk);
  1607	    match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip 'end' */
  1608	}
  1609	
  1610	static void throw_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1611	{
  1612	    bexpdesc e1, e2;
  1613	    /* 'raise' expr */
  1614	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'raise' */
  1615	    expr(parser, &e1);
  1616	    check_var(parser, &e1);
  1617	    if (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) {
  1618	        expr(parser, &e2);
  1619	        check_var(parser, &e2);
  1620	        be_code_raise(parser->finfo, &e1, &e2);
  1621	    } else {
  1622	        be_code_raise(parser->finfo, &e1, NULL);
  1623	    }
  1624	}
  1625	
  1626	static void statement(bparser *parser)
  1627	{
  1628	    switch (next_type(parser)) {
  1629	    case KeyIf: if_stmt(parser); break;
  1630	    case KeyWhile: while_stmt(parser); break;
  1631	    case KeyFor: for_stmt(parser); break;
  1632	    case KeyDo: do_stmt(parser); break;
  1633	    case KeyBreak: break_stmt(parser); break;
  1634	    case KeyContinue: continue_stmt(parser); break;
  1635	    case KeyDef: def_stmt(parser); break;
  1636	    case KeyClass: class_stmt(parser); break;
  1637	    case KeyReturn: return_stmt(parser); break;
  1638	    case KeyImport: import_stmt(parser); break;
  1639	    case KeyVar: var_stmt(parser); break;
  1640	    case KeyTry: try_stmt(parser); break;
  1641	    case KeyRaise: throw_stmt(parser); break;
  1642	    case OptSemic: scan_next_token(parser); break; /* empty statement */
  1643	    default: expr_stmt(parser); break;
  1644	    }
  1645	    be_assert(parser->finfo->freereg == be_list_count(parser->finfo->local));
  1646	}
  1647	
  1648	static void stmtlist(bparser *parser)
  1649	{
  1650	    while (block_follow(parser)) {
  1651	        statement(parser);
  1652	    }
  1653	}
  1654	
  1655	static void block(bparser *parser, int type)
  1656	{
  1657	    bblockinfo binfo;
  1658	    begin_block(parser->finfo, &binfo, type);
  1659	    stmtlist(parser);
  1660	    end_block(parser);
  1661	}
  1662	
  1663	static void mainfunc(bparser *parser, bclosure *cl)
  1664	{
  1665	    bblockinfo binfo;
  1666	    bfuncinfo finfo;
  1667	    begin_func(parser, &finfo, &binfo);
  1668	    finfo.proto->argc = 0; /* args */
  1669	    finfo.proto->name = be_newstr(parser->vm, funcname(parser));
  1670	    cl->proto = finfo.proto;
  1671	    be_remove(parser->vm, -3);  /* pop proto from stack */
  1672	    stmtlist(parser);
  1673	    end_func(parser);
  1674	    match_token(parser, TokenEOS); /* skip EOS */
  1675	}
  1676	
  1677	bclosure* be_parser_source(bvm *vm,
  1678	    const char *fname, breader reader, void *data, bbool islocal)
  1679	{
  1680	    bparser parser;
  1681	    bclosure *cl = be_newclosure(vm, 0);
  1682	    parser.vm = vm;
  1683	    parser.finfo = NULL;
  1684	    parser.cl = cl;
  1685	    parser.islocal = (bbyte)islocal;
  1686	    var_setclosure(vm->top, cl);
  1687	    be_stackpush(vm);
  1688	    be_lexer_init(&parser.lexer, vm, fname, reader, data);
  1689	    scan_next_token(&parser); /* scan first token */
  1690	    mainfunc(&parser, cl);
  1691	    be_lexer_deinit(&parser.lexer);
  1692	    be_global_release_space(vm); /* clear global space */
  1693	    be_stackpop(vm, 2); /* pop strtab */
  1694	    scan_next_token(&parser); /* clear lexer */
  1695	    return cl;
  1696	}

     8	#ifndef BE_OBJECT_H
     9	#define BE_OBJECT_H
    10	
    11	#include "berry.h"
    12	
    13	/* basic types, do not change value */
    14	#define BE_NONE         (-1)    /* unknown type */

    16	#define BE_INDEX        (-3)    /* index for instance variable, previously BE_INT */
    17	#define BE_NIL          0
    18	#define BE_INT          1
    19	#define BE_REAL         2
    20	#define BE_BOOL         3
    21	#define BE_FUNCTION     4
    22	#define BE_STRING       5       /* from this type can be gced, see BE_GCOBJECT */
    23	#define BE_CLASS        6
    24	#define BE_INSTANCE     7
    25	#define BE_PROTO        8

    46	typedef struct bgcobject {

    48	} bgcobject;
    49

    61	    bstring_header;
    62	} bstring;
    63	
    64	/* the definition of the vector and stack data structures.
    65	 * in fact, the stack is implemented by vector. */
    66	typedef struct bvector {
    67	    int capacity;   /* the number of elements that the vector can store */
    68	    int size;       /* the size of each element (bytes) */
    69	    int count;      /* number of elements of the vector */
    70	    void *data;     /* the data block pointer, if vector is empty,
    71	                       it will point to the first element */
    72	    void *end;      /* pointer to the last element, if the vector is empty,
    73	                       the end pointer will be smaller than the data pointer */
    74	} bvector, bstack;
    75	
    76	/* berry value data union, a berry value is always described
    77	 * by the data structure contained in the bvaldata union. */
    78	union bvaldata {
    79	    bbool b;        /* boolean */
    80	    breal r;        /* real number */
    81	    bint i;         /* integer number */
    82	    void *p;        /* object pointer */
    83	    const void *c;  /* const object pointer */
    84	    bstring *s;     /* string pointer */
    85	    bgcobject *gc;  /* GC object */
    86	    bntvfunc nf;    /* native C function */
    87	#ifdef __cplusplus
    88	    BE_CONSTEXPR bvaldata(bbool v) : b(v) {}
    89	    BE_CONSTEXPR bvaldata(breal v) : r(v) {}
    90	    BE_CONSTEXPR bvaldata(bint v) : i(v) {}
    91	    BE_CONSTEXPR bvaldata(void *v) : p(v) {}
    92	    BE_CONSTEXPR bvaldata(const void *v) : c(v) {}
    93	    BE_CONSTEXPR bvaldata(bntvfunc v) : nf(v) {}
    94	#endif
    95	};
    96	
    97	/* berry value. for simple types, the value of the data is stored,
    98	 * while the complex type stores a reference to the data. */
    99	typedef struct bvalue {

   132	
   133	typedef struct bproto {

   150	    blineinfo *lineinfo;

   152	#endif
   153	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO
   154	    bvarinfo *varinfo;
   155	    int nvarinfo;
   156	#endif
   157	} bproto;
   158	
   159	/* berry closure */
   160	struct bclosure {
   161	    bcommon_header;
   162	    bbyte nupvals;
   163	    bgcobject *gray; /* for gc gray list */
   164	    bproto *proto;
   165	    bupval *upvals[1];
   166	};
   167

   173	    bntvfunc f;
   174	};

   177	typedef struct {

   181	} bcommomobj;

   185	#define cast(_T, _v)            ((_T)(_v))
   186	#define cast_int(_v)            cast(int, _v)

   190	#define var_type(_v)            ((_v)->type)
   191	#define var_basetype(_v)        basetype((_v)->type)
   192	#define var_istype(_v, _t)      (var_type(_v) == _t)
   193	#define var_settype(_v, _t)     ((_v)->type = _t)

   207	#define var_isinstance(_v)      var_istype(_v, BE_INSTANCE)
   208	#define var_islist(_v)          var_istype(_v, BE_LIST)
   209	#define var_ismap(_v)           var_istype(_v, BE_MAP)
   210	#define var_ismodule(_v)        var_istype(_v, BE_MODULE)
   211	#define var_isindex(_v)         var_istype(_v, BE_INDEX)
   212	#define var_iscomptr(_v)        var_istype(_v, BE_COMPTR)
   213	#define var_isnumber(_v)        (var_isint(_v) || var_isreal(_v))
   214	
   215	#define var_setnil(_v)          var_settype(_v, BE_NIL)
   216	#define var_setval(_v, _s)      (*(_v) = *(_s))

   218	#define var_setint(_v, _i)      { var_settype(_v, BE_INT); (_v)->v.i = (_i); }
   219	#define var_setreal(_v, _r)     { var_settype(_v, BE_REAL); (_v)->v.r = (_r); }
   220	#define var_setstr(_v, _s)      var_setobj(_v, BE_STRING, _s)

   225	#define var_setntvfunc(_v, _o)  { (_v)->v.nf = (_o); var_settype(_v, BE_NTVFUNC); }
   226	#define var_setlist(_v, _o)     var_setobj(_v, BE_LIST, _o)
   227	#define var_setmap(_v, _o)      var_setobj(_v, BE_MAP, _o)
   228	#define var_setmodule(_v, _o)   var_setobj(_v, BE_MODULE, _o)
   229	#define var_setindex(_v, _i)      { var_settype(_v, BE_INDEX); (_v)->v.i = (_i); }
   230	#define var_setproto(_v, _o)    var_setobj(_v, BE_PROTO, _o)

     8	#ifndef BE_PARSER_H

    13	
    14	typedef enum {
    15	    ETVOID,    /* unknown (new variable or error) */
    16	    ETNIL,
    17	    ETBOOL,
    18	    ETREAL,
    19	    ETINT,
    20	    ETSTRING,
    21	    ETPROTO,
    22	    ETCONST,
    23	    ETLOCAL,    /* local variable, allocated until end of scope */
    24	    ETGLOBAL,   /* global by index number */
    25	    ETUPVAL,
    26	    ETMEMBER,   /* member accessor (by name) */
    27	    ETINDEX,    /* index accessor (ex array index) */
    28	    ETREG,      /* temporary register, can be freed if top of stack */
    29	    ETNGLOBAL   /* named global */
    30	} exptype_t;
    31	
    32	typedef struct {
    33	    union {
    34	        struct { /* for suffix */
    35	            unsigned int idx:9; /* suffix RK index */
    36	            unsigned int obj:9; /* object RK index */
    37	            unsigned int tt:5; /* object type */
    38	        } ss;
    39	        breal r;     /* for ETREAL */
    40	        bint i;      /* for ETINT */
    41	        bstring *s;  /* for ETSTRING */
    42	        bproto *p;  /* for ETPROTO */
    43	        int idx;     /* variable index */
    44	    } v;
    45	    int t; /* patch list of 'exit when true' */
    46	    int f; /* patch list of 'exit when false' */
    47	    bbyte not; /* not mark */
    48	    bbyte type;
    49	} bexpdesc;
    50	
    51	typedef struct bblockinfo {
    52	    struct bblockinfo *prev;

    21	/* Compilation options */
    22	typedef enum {

    52	    bgcobject *fixed; /* the fixed objecct list  */
    53	    size_t usage; /* the count of bytes currently allocated */
    54	    size_t threshold; /* he threshold of allocation for the next GC */

    56	    bbyte status;

    64

    80	    } u;

    83	
    84	struct bvm {

   100	    bmap *ntvclass; /* native class table */

   106	#endif
   107	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
   108	    bvalue hook;

   110	#endif
   111	};

     8	#ifndef BE_OBJECT_H
     9	#define BE_OBJECT_H
    10

    12	
    13	/* basic types, do not change value */
    14	#define BE_NONE         (-1)    /* unknown type */

    16	#define BE_INDEX        (-3)    /* index for instance variable, previously BE_INT */
    17	#define BE_NIL          0
    18	#define BE_INT          1
    19	#define BE_REAL         2
    20	#define BE_BOOL         3
    21	#define BE_FUNCTION     4
    22	#define BE_STRING       5       /* from this type can be gced, see BE_GCOBJECT */
    23	#define BE_CLASS        6
    24	#define BE_INSTANCE     7
    25	#define BE_PROTO        8
    26	#define BE_LIST         9
    27	#define BE_MAP          10

    36	#define bcommon_header          \
    37	    struct bgcobject *next;     \

    60	typedef struct bstring {
    61	    bstring_header;
    62	} bstring;
    63	
    64	/* the definition of the vector and stack data structures.
    65	 * in fact, the stack is implemented by vector. */
    66	typedef struct bvector {
    67	    int capacity;   /* the number of elements that the vector can store */
    68	    int size;       /* the size of each element (bytes) */
    69	    int count;      /* number of elements of the vector */
    70	    void *data;     /* the data block pointer, if vector is empty,
    71	                       it will point to the first element */
    72	    void *end;      /* pointer to the last element, if the vector is empty,
    73	                       the end pointer will be smaller than the data pointer */
    74	} bvector, bstack;
    75	
    76	/* berry value data union, a berry value is always described
    77	 * by the data structure contained in the bvaldata union. */
    78	union bvaldata {
    79	    bbool b;        /* boolean */
    80	    breal r;        /* real number */
    81	    bint i;         /* integer number */
    82	    void *p;        /* object pointer */
    83	    const void *c;  /* const object pointer */
    84	    bstring *s;     /* string pointer */
    85	    bgcobject *gc;  /* GC object */
    86	    bntvfunc nf;    /* native C function */
    87	#ifdef __cplusplus
    88	    BE_CONSTEXPR bvaldata(bbool v) : b(v) {}
    89	    BE_CONSTEXPR bvaldata(breal v) : r(v) {}
    90	    BE_CONSTEXPR bvaldata(bint v) : i(v) {}
    91	    BE_CONSTEXPR bvaldata(void *v) : p(v) {}
    92	    BE_CONSTEXPR bvaldata(const void *v) : c(v) {}
    93	    BE_CONSTEXPR bvaldata(bntvfunc v) : nf(v) {}
    94	#endif
    95	};
    96	
    97	/* berry value. for simple types, the value of the data is stored,
    98	 * while the complex type stores a reference to the data. */
    99	typedef struct bvalue {
   100	    union bvaldata v; /* the value data */
   101	    int type;         /* the value type */
   102	} bvalue;
   103	
   104	typedef struct {

   116	#else

   121	
   122	typedef struct {

   126	    uint16_t endpc;
   127	#else

   132	
   133	typedef struct bproto {
   134	    bcommon_header;

   139	    bgcobject *gray; /* for gc gray list */
   140	    bupvaldesc *upvals;

   144	    bstring *name; /* function name */

   149	#if BE_DEBUG_RUNTIME_INFO /* debug information */
   150	    blineinfo *lineinfo;

   152	#endif
   153	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO
   154	    bvarinfo *varinfo;
   155	    int nvarinfo;
   156	#endif

   158	
   159	/* berry closure */
   160	struct bclosure {
   161	    bcommon_header;
   162	    bbyte nupvals;
   163	    bgcobject *gray; /* for gc gray list */
   164	    bproto *proto;
   165	    bupval *upvals[1];
   166	};
   167	
   168	/* C native function or closure */
   169	struct bntvclos {
   170	    bcommon_header;
   171	    bbyte nupvals;
   172	    bgcobject *gray; /* for gc gray list */
   173	    bntvfunc f;
   174	};
   175	
   176	/* common object */
   177	typedef struct {
   178	    bcommon_header;
   179	    void *data;
   180	    bntvfunc destory;
   181	} bcommomobj;
   182	
   183	typedef const char* (*breader)(void*, size_t*);
   184	
   185	#define cast(_T, _v)            ((_T)(_v))
   186	#define cast_int(_v)            cast(int, _v)
   187	#define cast_bool(_v)           cast(bbool, _v)
   188	#define basetype(_t)            ((_t) & 0x1F)
   189	
   190	#define var_type(_v)            ((_v)->type)
   191	#define var_basetype(_v)        basetype((_v)->type)
   192	#define var_istype(_v, _t)      (var_type(_v) == _t)
   193	#define var_settype(_v, _t)     ((_v)->type = _t)
   194	#define var_setobj(_v, _t, _o)  { (_v)->v.p = _o; var_settype(_v, _t); }
   195	
   196	#define var_isnil(_v)           var_istype(_v, BE_NIL)
   197	#define var_isbool(_v)          var_istype(_v, BE_BOOL)
   198	#define var_isint(_v)           var_istype(_v, BE_INT)
   199	#define var_isreal(_v)          var_istype(_v, BE_REAL)
   200	#define var_isstr(_v)           var_istype(_v, BE_STRING)
   201	#define var_isclosure(_v)       var_istype(_v, BE_CLOSURE)
   202	#define var_isntvclos(_v)       var_istype(_v, BE_NTVCLOS)
   203	#define var_isntvfunc(_v)       var_istype(_v, BE_NTVFUNC)
   204	#define var_isfunction(_v)      (var_basetype(_v) == BE_FUNCTION)
   205	#define var_isproto(_v)         var_istype(_v, BE_PROTO)
   206	#define var_isclass(_v)         var_istype(_v, BE_CLASS)
   207	#define var_isinstance(_v)      var_istype(_v, BE_INSTANCE)
   208	#define var_islist(_v)          var_istype(_v, BE_LIST)
   209	#define var_ismap(_v)           var_istype(_v, BE_MAP)
   210	#define var_ismodule(_v)        var_istype(_v, BE_MODULE)
   211	#define var_isindex(_v)         var_istype(_v, BE_INDEX)
   212	#define var_iscomptr(_v)        var_istype(_v, BE_COMPTR)
   213	#define var_isnumber(_v)        (var_isint(_v) || var_isreal(_v))
   214	
   215	#define var_setnil(_v)          var_settype(_v, BE_NIL)
   216	#define var_setval(_v, _s)      (*(_v) = *(_s))
   217	#define var_setbool(_v, _b)     { var_settype(_v, BE_BOOL); (_v)->v.b = (bbool)(_b); }
   218	#define var_setint(_v, _i)      { var_settype(_v, BE_INT); (_v)->v.i = (_i); }
   219	#define var_setreal(_v, _r)     { var_settype(_v, BE_REAL); (_v)->v.r = (_r); }
   220	#define var_setstr(_v, _s)      var_setobj(_v, BE_STRING, _s)
   221	#define var_setinstance(_v, _o) var_setobj(_v, BE_INSTANCE, _o)
   222	#define var_setclass(_v, _o)    var_setobj(_v, BE_CLASS, _o)
   223	#define var_setclosure(_v, _o)  var_setobj(_v, BE_CLOSURE, _o)
   224	#define var_setntvclos(_v, _o)  var_setobj(_v, BE_NTVCLOS, _o)
   225	#define var_setntvfunc(_v, _o)  { (_v)->v.nf = (_o); var_settype(_v, BE_NTVFUNC); }
   226	#define var_setlist(_v, _o)     var_setobj(_v, BE_LIST, _o)
   227	#define var_setmap(_v, _o)      var_setobj(_v, BE_MAP, _o)
   228	#define var_setmodule(_v, _o)   var_setobj(_v, BE_MODULE, _o)
   229	#define var_setindex(_v, _i)      { var_settype(_v, BE_INDEX); (_v)->v.i = (_i); }
   230	#define var_setproto(_v, _o)    var_setobj(_v, BE_PROTO, _o)

   233	#define var_toint(_v)           ((_v)->v.i)
   234	#define var_toreal(_v)          ((_v)->v.r)
   235	#define var_tostr(_v)           ((_v)->v.s)
   236	#define var_togc(_v)            ((_v)->v.gc)
   237	#define var_toobj(_v)           ((_v)->v.p)
   238	#define var_tontvfunc(_v)       ((_v)->v.nf)
   239	#define var_toidx(_v)           cast_int(var_toint(_v))
   240

   242	bvalue* be_indexof(bvm *vm, int idx);
   243	void be_commonobj_delete(bvm *vm, bgcobject *obj);

    57	    int beginpc;      /* begin pc */
    58	    int continuelist; /* continue list */
    59	} bblockinfo;
    60	
    61	typedef struct bfuncinfo {
    62	    struct bfuncinfo *prev; /* outer function */
    63	    bproto *proto; /* the function prototype */
    64	    bblockinfo *binfo; /* block information */
    65	    struct blexer *lexer; /* the lexer pointer */
    66	    blist *local; /* local variable */
    67	    bmap *upval; /* upvalue variable */
    68	    bvector code; /* code vector */

    74	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO
    75	    bvector varvec;
    76	#endif
    77	    int pc; /* program count */
    78	    bbyte freereg; /* first free register */
    79	    bbyte flags; /* some flages */
    80	} bfuncinfo;
    81

    85	
    86	bclosure *be_parser_source(bvm *vm,
    87	    const char *fname, breader reader, void *data, bbool islocal);

    89	#endif
</output>

    13	#define comp_is_named_gbl(vm)       ((vm)->compopt & (1<<COMP_NAMED_GBL))

    15	#define comp_clear_named_gbl(vm)    ((vm)->compopt &= ~(1<<COMP_NAMED_GBL))
    16	
    17	#define comp_is_strict(vm)       ((vm)->compopt & (1<<COMP_STRICT))
    18	#define comp_set_strict(vm)      ((vm)->compopt |= (1<<COMP_STRICT))
    19	#define comp_clear_strict(vm)    ((vm)->compopt &= ~(1<<COMP_STRICT))
    20	
    21	/* Compilation options */
    22	typedef enum {
    23	    COMP_NAMED_GBL = 0x00, /* compile with named globals */
    24	    COMP_STRICT = 0x01, /* compile with named globals */
    25	} compoptmask;
    26	
    27	typedef struct {
    28	    struct {
    29	        bmap *vtab; /* global variable index table */
    30	        bvector vlist; /* global variable list */

    32	    struct {
    33	        bmap *vtab; /* built-in variable index table */
    34	        bvector vlist; /* built-in variable list */
    35	    } builtin;
    36	} bglobaldesc;
    37	
    38	typedef struct {
    39	    bvalue *func; /* function register pointer */

    41	    bvalue *reg; /* base register pointer */
    42	    binstruction *ip; /* instruction pointer (only berry-function) */
    43	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK

    45	#endif

    47	} bcallframe;
    48	
    49	struct bgc {
    50	    bgcobject *list; /* the GC-object list */
    51	    bgcobject *gray; /* the gray object list */
    52	    bgcobject *fixed; /* the fixed objecct list  */
    53	    size_t usage; /* the count of bytes currently allocated */
    54	    size_t threshold; /* he threshold of allocation for the next GC */
    55	    bbyte steprate; /* the rate of increase in the distribution between two GCs (percentage) */
    56	    bbyte status;
    57	};
    58	
    59	struct bstringtable {
    60	    bstring **table;
    61	    int count; /* string count */
    62	    int size;
    63	};
    64	
    65	struct bmoduledesc {

    67	    blist *path; /* module load path list */
    68	};
    69	
    70	typedef struct {
    71	    bvalue func;
    72	    binstruction *ip;
    73	} bcallsnapshot;
    74	
    75	struct bupval {

    77	    union {

    79	        struct bupval* next;
    80	    } u;
    81	    int refcnt;
    82	};
    83	
    84	struct bvm {
    85	    bglobaldesc gbldesc; /* global description */

    93	    bvalue *top; /* function top register */

    98	    struct bstringtable strtab; /* short string table */
    99	    bstack tracestack; /* call state trace-stack */
   100	    bmap *ntvclass; /* native class table */
   101	    blist *registry; /* registry list */
   102	    struct bgc gc;
   103	    bbyte compopt; /* compilation options */
   104	#if BE_USE_OBSERVABILITY_HOOK

   106	#endif
   107	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
   108	    bvalue hook;
   109	    bbyte hookmask;
   110	#endif
   111	};
   112	
   113	#define NONE_FLAG           0
   114	#define BASE_FRAME          (1 << 0)
   115	#define PRIM_FUNC           (1 << 1)
   116	
   117	void be_dofunc(bvm *vm, bvalue *v, int argc);
   118	bbool be_value2bool(bvm *vm, bvalue *v);
